premiumSeo.metaDescription: How the {tool} works, who it is for, what to enter, and how to read the result. Pricing and margin-risk decision support from SectorCalc.
premiumSeo.h1: {tool}: price the job and protect the margin
premiumSeo.intro: The {tool} helps you pressure-test a job before you commit to a price. It turns your costs, quantities, and rates into a clear margin and risk read, so you can spot the hidden drivers that quietly erode profit and decide with confidence instead of guessing on the bid.
premiumSeo.howTo: Enter {inputs} for your {sector} scenario. SectorCalc runs governed, deterministic formulas and returns {outputs}. Add optional fields when you have them to sharpen threshold and risk reads.
premiumSeo.method: The {tool} uses SectorCalc's formula governance layer: validated inputs, a deterministic calculation pipeline, and threshold checks. It is a technical simulation — not financial, legal, or engineering advice.
premiumSeo.mistakes: Stale labor or material rates, skipped optional inputs that capture hidden loss, mixed units, and treating the read as guaranteed profit are frequent errors. {pain} Verify inputs before business decisions.
premiumSeo.problem: Most jobs lose margin long before the invoice, when setup, rework, overruns, and underpriced line items are never added up before the quote goes out. The {tool} makes those drivers visible so they stop surprising you.
premiumSeo.help: It applies SectorCalc's deterministic calculation engine to your inputs, then highlights the factors that move the result the most. You get a structured read you can defend, not a black-box number.
premiumSeo.who: Operators, estimators, owners, and managers who price work, review bids, or need a consistent baseline across a team will get the most from the {tool}.
premiumSeo.inputs: Core fields include {inputs} ({inputCount} inputs in total). Required fields stay minimal; optional ones refine the verdict when your data is ready.
premiumSeo.outputs: {tool} returns {outputs} with metrics, threshold alerts, and risk drivers — so you see why the number lands where it does and what to adjust.
premiumSeo.trust: Premium results can include a Calculation Summary of inputs, assumptions, and validation — saved as exportable decision summaries for internal review.

faq.a: You can preview the approach for free; full verdict, metrics, and premium decision summary are included in SectorCalc Pro.
No. It is a technical simulation and decision-support tool, not financial, legal, or engineering advice. Verify results before business decisions.
Results reflect the inputs you provide and SectorCalc's deterministic engine. Better inputs produce a sharper, more defensible read.
Yes. Premium results can be exported as decision summaries with a Calculation Summary of how the numbers were derived.
It is tuned for its sector's pricing and margin patterns, and it sits alongside the rest of SectorCalc's 27-sector toolset.
Open the analyzer, enter {inputs}, and review {outputs}. Adjust inputs to stress-test the scenario before you commit to a price.

homeAbout.title: About Us
homeAbout.paragraph1: Profit often leaks from businesses through unnoticed costs, not sales. Incorrect pricing, calculation errors, waste, efficiency loss, and weak quoting discipline silently erode margins over time.
homeAbout.paragraph2: SectorCalc is engineered to make these invisible losses quantifiable. It elevates cost, proposal, efficiency, and risk decisions onto a faster, more transparent, and reliable baseline.
homeAbout.beliefSubtitle: Precision in calculation is the foundation of reliable performance.
homeAbout.highlightPrimary: A platform to expose hidden losses,
homeAbout.highlightSecondary: and transform computation into reliable decision support.

aboutPage.seoTitle: About SectorCalc | Industrial Calculation & Decision Support
aboutPage.seoDescription: SectorCalc helps businesses expose hidden losses, quantify operational risks, and turn industrial calculations into reliable decision support.

hero.title: Computation, turned into reliable decisions.
hero.lead: SectorCalc is a global industrial calculation and decision support platform that helps businesses expose hidden losses and act on them with confidence.

why.title: Why SectorCalc exists
why.body: Most operational losses never appear on an invoice. They hide in pricing, scrap, setup time, efficiency drops, and weak quoting discipline, and they erode margins quietly for years.

what.title: What SectorCalc is
what.body: A focused suite of sector calculators and decision reports that turn raw operational inputs into clear, defensible numbers, not another spreadsheet or a heavyweight ERP.

problem.title: The problem we solve
problem.body: Teams make cost, quote, and risk decisions on incomplete information. SectorCalc makes the invisible measurable, so decisions rest on evidence instead of guesswork.

how.title: How our system works
how.body: You provide the inputs you know; the system resolves what is required, runs governed deterministic calculations, and validates every result against invariants and benchmarks before showing it.

different.title: What makes us different
different.body: Every result carries a transparent calculation summary, indicative regional benchmarks, and documented assumptions you can review with your team before acting.

who.title: Who it is built for
who.body: Owner-operators, estimators, field teams, and consultants who need fast, reliable answers without hiring a full pricing desk or deploying enterprise software.

building.title: What we are building
building.body: A global standard for sector-specific calculation intelligence, expanding across industries while keeping every formula governed, auditable, and trustworthy.

manifesto.primary: A platform to expose hidden losses,
manifesto.secondary: and transform computation into reliable decision support.

descriptions.default: Component of the calculated loss breakdown.
descriptions.overproduction: Excess production beyond demand. Often caused by poor forecasting, large batch habits, or unbalanced production plans.
descriptions.waiting: Idle time losses. Caused by bottlenecks, unplanned downtime, or material shortages.
descriptions.transport: Unnecessary movement. Poor layout, repeated handling, or unoptimized routes.
descriptions.inventory: Excess stock. Driven by forecast error, high safety stock, or slow-moving items.
descriptions.motion: Unnecessary operator movement. Missing 5S, ergonomics issues, or hard-to-reach tools/materials.
descriptions.defects: Scrap and rework. Weak quality control, process variation, or material issues.
descriptions.overprocessing: Extra processing steps. Unneeded inspections, approvals, or over-engineering.
descriptions.dailyloss: Estimated daily monetary loss from the current waste profile.
descriptions.annualloss: Annualized loss projection based on frequency and working days.
descriptions.dataconfidencemultiplier: Adjustment factor reflecting input data confidence.

actions.default: Review root causes with your operations team and define a measurable improvement target.
actions.overproduction: Align production planning to demand, review Kanban levels, and reduce batch sizes where feasible.
actions.waiting: Analyze bottlenecks, apply SMED to cut setup time, and improve preventive maintenance.
actions.transport: Redesign material flow, shorten routes, and consolidate transfer batches.
actions.inventory: Review stock levels, apply JIT where possible, and run ABC analysis on slow movers.
actions.motion: Apply 5S and ergonomics improvements to reduce non-value movement.
actions.defects: Stand up a quality improvement team, run root-cause analysis, and add poka-yoke where practical.
actions.overprocessing: Value-stream the process and remove steps the customer does not pay for.
actions.dailyloss: Validate daily loss assumptions with shop-floor data before scaling actions.
actions.annualloss: Prioritize the highest annual-loss drivers in your kaizen backlog.
actions.dataconfidencemultiplier: Improve data confidence with meter readings, time studies, or ERP extracts.

length.label: Length
length.helper: Length of the area to be calculated. Standard SI unit. Used in construction, real estate, and manufacturing for area measurement.

width.label: Width
width.helper: Width of the area to be calculated. Standard SI unit. Used in construction, real estate, and manufacturing for area measurement.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Shape of the area. Different shapes require different formulas. Common in geometry and engineering design.

radius.label: Radius
radius.helper: Radius for circular shapes. Required when shape is 'circle'. Standard SI unit.

base.label: Base
base.helper: Base length for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

height.label: Height
height.helper: Height for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

topbase.label: Top Base
topbase.helper: Top base length for trapezoid. Required when shape is 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

length.label: Length
length.helper: Length of the area to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

width.label: Width
width.helper: Width of the area to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Shape of the area. Different formulas apply for different shapes.

radius.label: Radius
radius.helper: Radius for circular areas. Required when shape is 'circle'.

base.label: Base
base.helper: Base length for triangular areas. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

height.label: Height
height.helper: Height for triangular areas. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

length.label: Length
length.helper: Length of the concrete element (e.g., slab, beam). Based on structural engineering standards (ACI 318).

width.label: Width
width.helper: Width of the concrete element. ACI 318.

height.label: Height (Thickness)
height.helper: Height or thickness of the concrete element. ACI 318.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Cross-sectional shape of the element. For circular, diameter is used; for custom, additional inputs may be needed.

quantity.label: Number of identical elements
quantity.helper: Count of identical concrete elements to calculate total volume.

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor
wastefactor.helper: Additional concrete allowance for waste, spillage, and over-excavation. Typical range 5-10% per ACI 304R.

unitcost.label: Concrete unit cost
unitcost.helper: Cost per cubic meter of concrete mix. Varies by region and mix design.

projectvolume.label: Project Volume
projectvolume.helper: Total volume of concrete needed for the project. Based on ASTM C94 standard for ready-mixed concrete.

bagsize.label: Bag Size
bagsize.helper: Standard bag sizes available in the market. Common sizes per EN 197-1.

mixratio.label: Mix Ratio (cement:sand:aggregate)
mixratio.helper: Standard concrete mix ratios per ACI 211.1. 1:2:4 is common for general use.

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor
wastefactor.helper: Expected material waste due to spillage, over-excavation, etc. Typical range 5-10% per industry practice.

cementdensity.label: Cement Density
cementdensity.helper: Bulk density of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ per ASTM C188.

sanddensity.label: Sand Density
sanddensity.helper: Bulk density of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³ per ASTM C29.

aggregatedensity.label: Aggregate Density
aggregatedensity.helper: Bulk density of coarse aggregate. Typically 1500 kg/m³ per ASTM C29.

watercementratio.label: Water-Cement Ratio
watercementratio.helper: Water to cement ratio by weight. Affects strength and workability. Per ACI 318, typical 0.4-0.6.

bagcost.label: Cost per Bag
bagcost.helper: Unit cost of one bag of cement. Market price varies.

sandcost.label: Sand Cost per Tonne
sandcost.helper: Cost of sand per metric tonne. Local market price.

aggregatecost.label: Aggregate Cost per Tonne
aggregatecost.helper: Cost of coarse aggregate per metric tonne. Local market price.

watercost.label: Water Cost per m³
watercost.helper: Cost of water per cubic meter. Utility rate.

laborrate.label: Labor Rate per Hour
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for construction labor. Varies by region.

laborhoursperm3.label: Labor Hours per m³
laborhoursperm3.helper: Estimated labor hours required to mix and place one cubic meter of concrete. Based on industry benchmarks.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment Cost per m³
equipmentcost.helper: Cost of mixer, vibrator, etc. per m³. Includes depreciation and fuel.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

paintvolume.label: Paint Volume
paintvolume.helper: Total volume of paint to be used. Based on manufacturer specifications and ASTM D2697.

coveragerate.label: Coverage Rate
coveragerate.helper: Typical coverage per liter; varies by paint type and surface. Refer to ISO 8501 for surface preparation standards.

numberofcoats.label: Number of Coats
numberofcoats.helper: Number of coats applied. Industry standard for most applications is 2 coats.

surfacearea.label: Surface Area
surfacearea.helper: Total area to be painted. Measured per project specifications.

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor
wastefactor.helper: Percentage of paint wasted due to overspray, spillage, etc. Typical range 5-15% based on Lean manufacturing principles.

painttype.label: Paint Type
painttype.helper: Type of paint affects coverage rate and application method. Refer to ASTM D5146 for paint testing.

surfacecondition.label: Surface Condition
surfacecondition.helper: Surface texture impacts paint absorption and coverage. Based on ISO 8501 surface preparation grades.

applicationmethod.label: Application Method
applicationmethod.helper: Method affects transfer efficiency and waste. Spray has higher waste; brush/roller more efficient.

roomlength.label: Room Length
roomlength.helper: Length of the room to be floored. Standard architectural measurement per ISO 9001.

roomwidth.label: Room Width
roomwidth.helper: Width of the room. Used to calculate area.

flooringunitcost.label: Flooring Unit Cost
flooringunitcost.helper: Cost per square meter of flooring material. Market price based on supplier quotes.

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor
wastefactor.helper: Percentage of material waste due to cutting and fitting. Industry standard 5-15% per Lean construction practices.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage for flooring installers. Based on local labor rates.

installationtimepersqm.label: Installation Time per m²
installationtimepersqm.helper: Time required to install one square meter of flooring. Industry benchmark from RSMeans.

additionalcosts.label: Additional Costs
additionalcosts.helper: Miscellaneous costs like adhesive, underlayment, or disposal fees.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment per Six Sigma DMAIC.

rooflength.label: Roof Length
rooflength.helper: Length of the roof along the ridge. Based on standard architectural measurements.

roofwidth.label: Roof Width
roofwidth.helper: Width of the roof from eave to eave. Standard dimension for rectangular roofs.

roofpitch.label: Roof Pitch (rise/run)
roofpitch.helper: Slope of the roof expressed as rise over run. Common values: 0.5 (6/12), 1.0 (12/12).

overhang.label: Eave Overhang
overhang.helper: Extra length extending beyond the walls for water runoff. Typical 0.3-0.6 m.

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor
wastefactor.helper: Percentage of material waste due to cutting and overlap. Industry standard 5-15%.

rooftype.label: Roof Type
rooftype.helper: Architectural style affecting area calculation. Gable: simple triangle ends; Hip: slopes on all sides.

riserheight.label: Riser Height
riserheight.helper: Building codes (e.g., IBC, Eurocode) specify riser height between 100-220 mm for safety and comfort.

treaddepth.label: Tread Depth
treaddepth.helper: Building codes require tread depth typically 200-400 mm to ensure adequate foot space.

numberofsteps.label: Number of Steps
numberofsteps.helper: Total steps in the stair flight; determined by floor height and riser height.

stairwidth.label: Stair Width
stairwidth.helper: Minimum width per building codes (e.g., 800 mm for residential, 1000 mm for commercial).

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material affects structural design, cost, and durability. Standards: ACI 318 for concrete, AISC for steel.

unitcostmaterial.label: Unit Cost of Material
unitcostmaterial.helper: Cost per cubic meter of chosen material; varies by region and quality.

laborrate.label: Labor Rate
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for construction labor; includes overhead.

laborhoursperstep.label: Labor Hours per Step
laborhoursperstep.helper: Estimated labor time to construct one step; based on industry benchmarks.

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor
wastefactor.helper: Percentage of material waste due to cutting, errors; typical 5-10%.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data; used for risk-adjusted outputs.

walllength.label: Wall Length
walllength.helper: Total length of wall to be covered. Standard construction practice (ASTM C840).

wallheight.label: Wall Height
wallheight.helper: Height of wall. Typical residential ceiling height 8-10 ft.

sheetwidth.label: Sheet Width
sheetwidth.helper: Standard drywall sheet width. Common sizes: 4 ft (ASTM C1396).

sheetlength.label: Sheet Length
sheetlength.helper: Standard drywall sheet length. Common sizes: 8, 10, 12 ft.

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor
wastefactor.helper: Percentage of material waste due to cuts and errors. Industry standard 5-15% (RSMeans).

laborrate.label: Labor Rate
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for drywall installers. Varies by region (BLS data).

materialcostpersheet.label: Material Cost per Sheet
materialcostpersheet.helper: Cost per drywall sheet. Depends on thickness, type (e.g., moisture resistant).

laborproductivity.label: Labor Productivity
laborproductivity.helper: Number of sheets installed per hour per worker. Typical 1-3 sheets/hr (RSMeans).

numworkers.label: Number of Workers
numworkers.helper: Crew size for installation. Typically 2-3 workers.

walllength.label: Wall Length
walllength.helper: Length of the wall to be built. Standard construction practice.

wallheight.label: Wall Height
wallheight.helper: Height of the wall. Standard construction practice.

bricklength.label: Brick Length
bricklength.helper: Length of a single brick. Common brick size per ISO 9001.

brickheight.label: Brick Height
brickheight.helper: Height of a single brick. Common brick size per ISO 9001.

brickdepth.label: Brick Depth
brickdepth.helper: Depth of a single brick. Common brick size per ISO 9001.

mortarthickness.label: Mortar Thickness
mortarthickness.helper: Thickness of mortar joints. Standard construction practice per ASTM C270.

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor
wastefactor.helper: Percentage of bricks wasted due to breakage or cutting. Industry standard 5-10%.

bondtype.label: Bond Type
bondtype.helper: Type of brick bond pattern. Affects brick count per area. Common masonry standards.

quantity.label: Number of Rebars
quantity.helper: Total number of identical rebars to calculate total weight.

diameter.label: Rebar Diameter
diameter.helper: Standard rebar diameters per ASTM A615/A615M. Common sizes: 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 20, 22, 25, 28, 32, 36, 40, 50 mm.

length.label: Rebar Length
length.helper: Length of rebar piece. Typical stock lengths: 6m, 12m, 18m. User can input custom length.

steeldensity.label: Steel Density
steeldensity.helper: Density of steel. Standard value 7850 kg/m³ per ASTM A36. Variations for different steel grades.

unitsystem.label: Unit System
unitsystem.helper: Select unit system. Metric uses mm, m, kg. Imperial uses inch, ft, lb. Conversion factors applied.

length.label: Excavation Length
length.helper: Length of excavation area. Based on civil engineering standards (e.g., ASTM D3740).

width.label: Excavation Width
width.helper: Width of excavation area. Common in earthwork calculations.

depth.label: Excavation Depth
depth.helper: Depth of excavation. Critical for volume and stability analysis.

slopeangle.label: Slope Angle
slopeangle.helper: Angle of excavation sides for safety and volume adjustment. OSHA standards recommend max 34° for Type A soil.

soiltype.label: Soil Type
soiltype.helper: Soil classification per OSHA 29 CFR 1926 Subpart P. Affects slope requirements and volume.

swellfactor.label: Swell Factor
swellfactor.helper: Percentage increase in volume after excavation due to soil loosening. Typical values: 20-30% for common earth.

compactionfactor.label: Compaction Factor
compactionfactor.helper: Percentage of original density achieved after compaction. ASTM D698 standard.

walllength.label: Wall Length
walllength.helper: Length of the wall to be plastered. Standard construction measurement.

wallheight.label: Wall Height
wallheight.helper: Height of the wall. Standard construction measurement.

plasterthickness.label: Plaster Thickness
plasterthickness.helper: Thickness of plaster layer. Typical range 10-20 mm for internal walls.

mixratio.label: Mix Ratio (Cement:Sand)
mixratio.helper: Cement to sand ratio by volume. Common ratios: 1:4 for internal plaster, 1:3 for external.

cementdensity.label: Cement Density
cementdensity.helper: Bulk density of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ per IS 875.

sanddensity.label: Sand Density
sanddensity.helper: Bulk density of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³.

wastagefactor.label: Wastage Factor
wastagefactor.helper: Percentage allowance for material wastage during mixing and application. Industry standard 5-10%.

laborrate.label: Labor Rate
laborrate.helper: Cost of labor per square meter of plastering. Varies by region.

cementprice.label: Cement Price
cementprice.helper: Price per bag of cement (typically 50 kg).

sandprice.label: Sand Price
sandprice.helper: Price per cubic meter of sand.

roomlength.label: Room Length (m)
roomlength.helper: Physical dimension of the room. Standard construction practice (ISO 1000).

roomwidth.label: Room Width (m)
roomwidth.helper: Physical dimension of the room. Standard construction practice (ISO 1000).

flooringtype.label: Flooring Type
flooringtype.helper: Material selection affects cost and waste factor. Industry standards (ASTM F1869 for moisture, etc.).

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor (%)
wastefactor.helper: Typical waste factor for flooring installation: 5-15% depending on pattern and room shape. Lean construction principles recommend minimizing waste.

materialcostperm2.label: Material Cost per m² (currency)
materialcostperm2.helper: Market price for selected flooring type. Sourced from local suppliers or RSMeans cost data.

laborcostperm2.label: Labor Cost per m² (currency)
laborcostperm2.helper: Installation labor rate. Varies by region and complexity. Industry benchmarks from BLS or RSMeans.

additionalcosts.label: Additional Costs (currency)
additionalcosts.helper: Miscellaneous costs: underlayment, adhesive, removal of old flooring, etc.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment. Common in project management (PMBOK).

loanamount.label: Loan Amount
loanamount.helper: Principal amount borrowed. Standard financial practice per GAAP.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Rate
annualinterestrate.helper: Annual nominal interest rate. Based on market rates and lender terms.

loantermmonths.label: Loan Term (Months)
loantermmonths.helper: Duration of loan in months. Common terms: 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, 120, 240, 360.

paymentfrequency.label: Payment Frequency
paymentfrequency.helper: How often payments are made. Affects compounding and total interest.

extrapayment.label: Extra Payment per Period
extrapayment.helper: Additional principal payment each period to reduce loan term and interest.

compoundfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundfrequency.helper: How often interest is compounded. Affects effective interest rate.

homeprice.label: Home Price
homeprice.helper: Purchase price of the property. Standard real estate valuation.

downpayment.label: Down Payment
downpayment.helper: Initial upfront payment. Typically 20% to avoid PMI.

loanterm.label: Loan Term
loanterm.helper: Duration of the loan. Common terms: 15, 20, 30 years.

propertytaxrate.label: Annual Property Tax Rate
propertytaxrate.helper: Percentage of home value paid annually in property taxes.

homeinsurancerate.label: Annual Home Insurance Rate
homeinsurancerate.helper: Percentage of home value paid annually for insurance.

pmirate.label: PMI Rate (if down payment < 20%)
pmirate.helper: Private mortgage insurance rate if down payment < 20%.

annualincome.label: Annual Gross Income
annualincome.helper: Borrower's annual income for debt-to-income ratio.

monthlydebts.label: Other Monthly Debt Payments
monthlydebts.helper: Existing monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, etc.).

principal.label: Principal Amount
principal.helper: Initial amount of money borrowed or invested. Standard financial practice.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Rate
annualinterestrate.helper: Yearly interest rate as a percentage. Common in loan and investment calculations.

timeperiod.label: Time Period
timeperiod.helper: Duration for which interest is calculated. Typically in years.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: How often interest is compounded. Affects total interest earned/paid.

interesttype.label: Interest Type
interesttype.helper: Simple interest is linear; compound interest grows exponentially.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Used for risk-adjusted outputs.

principal.label: Principal Amount
principal.helper: Initial investment or loan amount. Standard financial practice.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Rate (%)
annualinterestrate.helper: Nominal annual interest rate. Based on market rates or contract terms.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: Number of compounding periods per year. Common values: annually (1), semi-annually (2), quarterly (4), monthly (12), daily (365), or continuous.

timeperiod.label: Time Period
timeperiod.helper: Duration of investment or loan in years. Standard financial planning horizon.

additionalcontribution.label: Additional Contribution per Period
additionalcontribution.helper: Regular contribution added each compounding period. Common in savings plans.

contributiontiming.label: Contribution Timing
contributiontiming.helper: Whether contributions are made at the beginning or end of each period. Affects future value calculation.

originalprice.label: Original Price
originalprice.helper: The initial price before any discount. Standard pricing practice per ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.5 (monitoring and measuring resources).

discountpercent.label: Discount Percentage
discountpercent.helper: Percentage reduction applied to original price. Common in retail and B2B pricing strategies; referenced in financial accounting standards (IFRS 15).

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.helper: Number of items purchased. Volume discounts are typical in supply chain management (APICS/SCOR model).

taxrate.label: Tax Rate
taxrate.helper: Sales tax or VAT applicable. Based on local tax regulations; ISO 14000 may apply for environmental taxes.

additionaldiscount.label: Additional Discount
additionaldiscount.helper: Fixed additional discount (e.g., coupon). Common in promotional campaigns; referenced in marketing ROI analysis.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: Currency for monetary values. ISO 4217 currency codes standard.

value.label: Value
value.helper: The base value for percentage calculation. Typically represents a quantity or amount.

percentage.label: Percentage
percentage.helper: The percentage to apply to the value. Standard percentage range 0-100.

mode.label: Calculation Mode
mode.helper: Select the type of percentage calculation: percentageOf (X% of Y), percentageChange (increase/decrease from base), valueFromPercentage (find base from percentage and result).

basevalue.label: Base Value
basevalue.helper: The base value for percentage change calculations. Required when mode is 'percentageChange'.

resultvalue.label: Result Value
resultvalue.helper: The resulting value for valueFromPercentage mode. Required when mode is 'valueFromPercentage'.

revenue.label: Total Revenue
revenue.helper: Total sales revenue from goods or services. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

cogs.label: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
cogs.helper: Direct costs attributable to production. Includes materials, labor, overhead. Per standard cost accounting (IMA).

operatingexpenses.label: Operating Expenses
operatingexpenses.helper: SG&A, R&D, depreciation, etc. Excludes interest and taxes. Based on income statement structure.

otherincome.label: Other Income
otherincome.helper: Non-operating income (e.g., interest, gains). Included for net profit margin.

taxrate.label: Effective Tax Rate
taxrate.helper: Effective corporate tax rate. Based on jurisdiction (OECD average ~25%).

interestexpense.label: Interest Expense
interestexpense.helper: Cost of debt financing. Used to compute net profit margin.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Based on risk management practices (ISO 31000).

fixedcosts.label: Fixed Costs
fixedcosts.helper: Total fixed costs (e.g., rent, salaries, insurance) per period. Based on cost accounting standards (e.g., GAAP, IFRS).

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Cost per Unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Cost that varies with production volume (e.g., materials, labor). Standard in managerial accounting.

sellingpriceperunit.label: Selling Price per Unit
sellingpriceperunit.helper: Revenue per unit sold. Must exceed variable cost for positive contribution margin.

timeperiod.label: Time Period
timeperiod.helper: Period for which fixed costs are defined. Aligns with financial reporting periods.

targetprofit.label: Target Profit
targetprofit.helper: Desired profit above break-even. Used for target volume calculations.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (e.g., based on historical accuracy). Adjusts results for uncertainty.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment
initialinvestment.helper: Total upfront cost including equipment, installation, and training. Based on capital budgeting standards (NPV, IRR).

annualnetcashinflow.label: Annual Net Cash Inflow
annualnetcashinflow.helper: Expected annual incremental cash inflows minus outflows from the investment. Based on discounted cash flow analysis.

projectlifetime.label: Project Lifetime
projectlifetime.helper: Expected useful life of the investment. Typical range 1-50 years based on asset depreciation standards (MACRS).

discountrate.label: Discount Rate
discountrate.helper: Cost of capital or required rate of return. Based on CAPM or WACC standards.

salvagevalue.label: Salvage Value
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual value at end of project lifetime. Based on asset depreciation methods.

annualoperatingcost.label: Annual Operating Cost
annualoperatingcost.helper: Recurring costs such as maintenance, labor, energy. Based on life cycle costing (ISO 15686).

annualrevenueincrease.label: Annual Revenue Increase
annualrevenueincrease.helper: Expected additional revenue from the investment. Based on market analysis and forecasting.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk-adjusted ROI. Based on sensitivity analysis standards.

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary (Gross)
annualsalary.helper: Base annual gross salary per employee. Standard HR metric.

bonuspercentage.label: Bonus Percentage
bonuspercentage.helper: Annual bonus as percentage of salary. Common in compensation packages.

employertaxrate.label: Employer Tax Rate (Social Security, etc.)
employertaxrate.placeholder: Enter employer tax rate (social security, etc.)
employertaxrate.helper: Employer-paid taxes (e.g., Social Security, Medicare in US). Varies by country.

benefitscost.label: Benefits Cost per Employee per Year
benefitscost.placeholder: Enter benefits cost per employee per year
benefitscost.helper: Health insurance, retirement contributions, etc. Industry benchmark: ~30% of salary.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate (Facilities, IT, etc.)
overheadrate.helper: Indirect costs allocated per employee. Common in cost accounting.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working Days per Year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Standard working days (excluding weekends and holidays). Typical: 260.

hoursperday.label: Hours per Day
hoursperday.helper: Standard working hours per day. Typical: 8.

productiveutilization.label: Productive Utilization Rate
productiveutilization.helper: Percentage of paid time spent on productive work. Lean metric; typical 70-85%.

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary
annualsalary.helper: Base annual salary of the employee. Standard compensation practice.

benefitspercent.label: Benefits Percentage
benefitspercent.helper: Percentage of salary for benefits (health, retirement, etc.). Typical range 25-35%.

overheadpercent.label: Overhead Percentage
overheadpercent.helper: Indirect costs (facilities, equipment, admin). Industry benchmark 40-60%.

profitmarginpercent.label: Profit Margin Percentage
profitmarginpercent.helper: Desired profit margin on labor. Typical 10-30%.

paidhoursperyear.label: Paid Hours Per Year
paidhoursperyear.helper: Total paid hours (40 hrs/week * 52 weeks). Standard full-time.

billablehoursperyear.label: Billable Hours Per Year
billablehoursperyear.helper: Hours actually billed to clients. Typically 85-90% of paid hours.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor.

assetcost.label: Asset Cost
assetcost.helper: Initial cost of the asset. Based on accounting standards (IAS 16, GAAP).

salvagevalue.label: Salvage Value
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual value at end of useful life. Per IAS 16.

usefullife.label: Useful Life
usefullife.helper: Expected operational life. Industry standards vary; typical range 3-30 years.

depreciationmethod.label: Depreciation Method
depreciationmethod.helper: Common methods per GAAP and IFRS. Straight-line is simplest; declining-balance accelerates expense.

decliningbalancefactor.label: Declining Balance Factor
decliningbalancefactor.helper: Factor for declining balance method (e.g., 2 for double-declining). Typical values: 1.5, 2, 2.5.

productionunits.label: Total Production Units
productionunits.helper: Estimated total units to be produced over life. Used in units-of-production method.

unitsproducedthisyear.label: Units Produced This Year
unitsproducedthisyear.helper: Actual units produced in current period for units-of-production method.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (0-100%). Used for adjusted output.

accountsreceivable.label: Accounts Receivable (Alacaklar)
accountsreceivable.helper: Average accounts receivable balance. Based on standard financial statement analysis (GAAP/IFRS).

accountspayable.label: Accounts Payable (Borçlar)
accountspayable.helper: Average accounts payable balance. Standard financial metric.

inventory.label: Inventory (Stok)
inventory.helper: Average inventory value. Based on supply chain management principles (APICS).

costofgoodssold.label: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
costofgoodssold.helper: Annual cost of goods sold. Standard income statement item.

netsales.label: Net Sales (Net Satışlar)
netsales.helper: Annual net sales revenue. Standard income statement item.

operatingexpenses.label: Operating Expenses (Faaliyet Giderleri)
operatingexpenses.helper: Annual operating expenses excluding COGS. Standard financial metric.

daysinperiod.label: Days in Period (Dönem Günü)
daysinperiod.helper: Number of days in the analysis period. Typically 365 for annual.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (Veri Güveni)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data quality. Used for adjusted outputs.

availabletimeperday.label: Available Time per Day (hours)
availabletimeperday.helper: Total time machine is available per day, including planned downtime. Based on OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) standard.

planneddowntimeperday.label: Planned Downtime per Day (hours)
planneddowntimeperday.helper: Scheduled maintenance, breaks, etc. ISO 22400 for manufacturing operations management.

unplanneddowntimeperday.label: Unplanned Downtime per Day (hours)
unplanneddowntimeperday.helper: Breakdowns, setup, adjustments. Lean manufacturing focus on reducing unplanned downtime.

operatingspeed.label: Operating Speed (units per hour)
operatingspeed.helper: Actual production speed. Compared to ideal speed for performance calculation.

idealspeed.label: Ideal Speed (units per hour)
idealspeed.helper: Theoretical maximum speed. Used for performance metric in OEE.

defectrate.label: Defect Rate (fraction)
defectrate.helper: Proportion of defective units. Quality metric in Six Sigma.

hourlycost.label: Hourly Cost (currency per hour)
hourlycost.helper: Machine operating cost including labor, energy, maintenance. Used for cost analysis.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final output for risk.

cuttinglength.label: Cutting Length
cuttinglength.helper: Total length of material to be cut along the tool path. Based on ISO 8688-1 tool life testing standards.

feedrate.label: Feed Rate
feedrate.helper: Linear feed speed of the cutting tool. Typical values from machinery handbook (e.g., 0.1-0.5 mm/rev for steel).

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed
spindlespeed.helper: Rotational speed of the spindle. Determines cutting speed; standard ranges per material (e.g., 2000-6000 RPM for aluminum).

numberofpasses.label: Number of Passes
numberofpasses.helper: Number of cutting passes required to achieve final dimension. Based on depth of cut and material removal rate.

rapidtraverserate.label: Rapid Traverse Rate
rapidtraverserate.helper: Maximum speed for non-cutting movements (tool positioning). Typical machine specs: 10-30 m/min.

rapiddistance.label: Rapid Traverse Distance
rapiddistance.helper: Total distance traveled during rapid moves per cycle. Includes approach and retract.

toolchangetime.label: Tool Change Time
toolchangetime.helper: Time to change a tool. Typical automatic tool changer: 2-10 sec.

numberoftoolchanges.label: Number of Tool Changes
numberoftoolchanges.helper: Number of tool changes per cycle. Based on operation sequence.

loadingunloadingtime.label: Loading/Unloading Time
loadingunloadingtime.helper: Time to load and unload workpiece. Manual: 20-60 sec; automated: 5-15 sec.

idletime.label: Idle Time per Cycle
idletime.helper: Non-productive time per cycle (e.g., dwell, inspection). Lean manufacturing focus on reducing idle time.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Low: ±20% uncertainty; Medium: ±10%; High: ±5%. Based on Six Sigma data quality assessment.

laborrate.label: Labor rate
laborrate.helper: Hourly welder rate

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material type affects cutting speed and power requirements. Based on laser cutting industry standards (e.g., Trumpf, Bystronic).

materialthickness.label: Material Thickness
materialthickness.helper: Thickness directly impacts cutting speed and time. Typical range for laser cutting: 0.5-25 mm.

cuttinglength.label: Total Cutting Length
cuttinglength.helper: Total length of cuts per part or batch. Determines primary cutting time.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed
cuttingspeed.helper: Speed depends on material and thickness. Typical values from machine manufacturer tables.

piercingtimeperpierce.label: Piercing Time per Pierce
piercingtimeperpierce.helper: Time to pierce the material at start of each cut. Varies with material and thickness.

numberofpierces.label: Number of Pierces
numberofpierces.helper: Number of pierces per part or batch. Typically equals number of cut contours.

rapidtraversedistance.label: Rapid Traverse Distance
rapidtraversedistance.helper: Distance the laser head moves without cutting (positioning).

rapidtraversespeed.label: Rapid Traverse Speed
rapidtraversespeed.helper: Maximum positioning speed of the laser head. Typical: 60-120 m/min.

setuptime.label: Setup Time
setuptime.helper: Time for loading material, programming, and machine preparation.

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of identical parts in the batch. Affects setup amortization.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Operator labor cost including overhead. Typical range: $20-$80/h.

machinecostperhour.label: Machine Cost per Hour
machinecostperhour.helper: Machine depreciation, maintenance, energy, and consumables. Typical: $30-$200/h.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects output adjustment for risk.

laborrate.label: Labor rate
laborrate.helper: Operator rate

materialcostperkg.label: Material Cost per kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Cost of filament or resin per kilogram. Typical range for PLA: $20-50, ABS: $30-60, resin: $50-150. Source: industry benchmarks.

materialdensity.label: Material Density
materialdensity.helper: Density of printing material. PLA ~1.24 g/cm³, ABS ~1.04 g/cm³, PETG ~1.27 g/cm³. Used to convert volume to weight.

partvolume.label: Part Volume
partvolume.helper: Volume of the printed part, typically from CAD model. Affects material usage and print time.

infillpercentage.label: Infill Percentage
infillpercentage.helper: Percentage of internal volume filled with material. 0% for hollow, 100% for solid. Affects material usage and strength.

printtimehours.label: Print Time
printtimehours.helper: Estimated print duration. Affects machine and labor cost. Typical range: 1-100 hours.

machinecostperhour.label: Machine Cost per Hour
machinecostperhour.helper: Depreciation, maintenance, and electricity cost per hour. For a $2000 printer over 2000 hours: $1/hour plus electricity $0.1-0.5/hour.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Operator's hourly wage including overhead. Affects post-processing and monitoring time.

postprocessingtimehours.label: Post-Processing Time
postprocessingtimehours.helper: Time for support removal, sanding, painting, etc. Affects labor cost.

failurerate.label: Failure Rate
failurerate.helper: Percentage of prints that fail. Affects effective cost per successful part. Typical range: 2-20%.

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of identical parts printed in one run. Affects setup cost amortization.

setupcost.label: Setup Cost
setupcost.helper: One-time cost for file preparation, bed leveling, etc. Amortized over batch size.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Percentage added to direct costs for facility, admin, etc. Typical: 15-30%.

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Desired profit margin on total cost. Typical: 20-50%.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material density varies; standard densities from ASM Handbook.

thickness.label: Thickness
thickness.helper: Sheet thickness; typical range 0.1-100 mm per ISO 3574.

width.label: Width
width.helper: Sheet width; standard widths up to 5000 mm.

length.label: Length
length.helper: Sheet length; standard lengths up to 12000 mm.

unitsystem.label: Unit System
unitsystem.helper: Select measurement system; metric (mm, kg) or imperial (in, lb).

totalmaterialinput.label: Total Material Input
totalmaterialinput.helper: Total raw material entering the production process. Based on ISO 14051 material flow cost accounting (MFCA) standards.

goodoutput.label: Good Output
goodoutput.helper: Quantity of product meeting quality specifications. Derived from Six Sigma yield metrics.

scraprate.label: Scrap Rate
scraprate.helper: Percentage of material that becomes scrap during processing. Based on lean manufacturing waste reduction principles.

reworkrate.label: Rework Rate
reworkrate.helper: Percentage of output requiring rework. Common metric in quality management (ISO 9001).

materialcostperkg.label: Material Cost per kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Purchase cost of raw material per kilogram. Used for financial impact calculation.

disposalcostperkg.label: Disposal Cost per kg
disposalcostperkg.helper: Cost to dispose of waste material. Environmental cost factor per ISO 14000.

productionvolume.label: Production Volume
productionvolume.helper: Total units produced in the period. Used to scale waste calculations.

timeperiod.label: Time Period
timeperiod.helper: Time basis for calculations. Enables scaling to annual waste and cost.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Based on data quality assessment frameworks.

totalproductionquantity.label: Total Production Quantity
totalproductionquantity.helper: Total number of units produced in the period. Based on production records (ISO 9001).

scrapquantity.label: Scrap Quantity
scrapquantity.helper: Number of units scrapped due to defects or waste. Direct measure from quality control (Six Sigma).

reworkquantity.label: Rework Quantity
reworkquantity.helper: Units that required rework but not scrapped. Important for total waste analysis (Lean).

costperunit.label: Cost per Unit
costperunit.helper: Average cost to produce one unit including materials, labor, overhead. Used for financial impact (Managerial Accounting).

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework Cost per Unit
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional cost to rework one unit. Typically lower than original cost but significant (Lean Accounting).

perioddays.label: Period Days
perioddays.helper: Number of days in the analysis period. Used for rate normalization (standard reporting).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs (risk management).

plannedproductiontime.label: Planned Production Time
plannedproductiontime.helper: Total time scheduled for production per shift/day. Based on ISO 22400 (KPIs for manufacturing operations management).

operatingtime.label: Operating Time
operatingtime.helper: Actual time the equipment is running (planned production time minus downtime). Key for Availability calculation.

idealcycletime.label: Ideal Cycle Time
idealcycletime.helper: Theoretical minimum time to produce one unit under optimal conditions. Used in Performance calculation.

totalpartsproduced.label: Total Parts Produced
totalpartsproduced.helper: Total number of parts produced during operating time. Includes both good and defective parts.

goodpartsproduced.label: Good Parts Produced
goodpartsproduced.helper: Number of parts meeting quality standards. Used in Quality calculation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective assessment of data accuracy. Adjusts final OEE for uncertainty. Common in lean manufacturing assessments.

machinepurchasecost.label: Machine Purchase Cost
machinepurchasecost.helper: Initial capital investment for the machine. Based on standard cost accounting principles (Maynard).

usefullifeyears.label: Useful Life (Years)
usefullifeyears.helper: Expected operational life of the machine. Typical range 5-20 years per industry standards (ISO 15663).

salvagevalue.label: Salvage Value
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated resale value at end of useful life. Usually 5-20% of purchase cost.

annualoperatinghours.label: Annual Operating Hours
annualoperatinghours.helper: Total hours the machine is operated per year. Based on typical single shift (2000 hrs) or multi-shift operations.

maintenancecostperyear.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
maintenancecostperyear.helper: Average yearly maintenance expenses including parts and labor. Typically 2-5% of purchase cost.

energyconsumptionkw.label: Energy Consumption (kW)
energyconsumptionkw.helper: Average power draw during operation. Based on machine specifications (ISO 50001).

energycostperkwh.label: Energy Cost per kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Local electricity rate. Varies by region; typical range $0.05-$0.30.

operatorlaborcostperhour.label: Operator Labor Cost per Hour
operatorlaborcostperhour.placeholder: Enter operator labor cost per hour
operatorlaborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage including benefits for machine operator. Based on labor market data.

floorspacesqft.label: Floor Space Occupied (sq ft)
floorspacesqft.helper: Area occupied by the machine including clearance. Used for space cost allocation.

annualfacilitycostpersqft.label: Annual Facility Cost per sq ft
annualfacilitycostpersqft.placeholder: Enter annual facility cost per sq ft
annualfacilitycostpersqft.helper: Yearly cost per square foot for rent, utilities, insurance, etc. Typical $5-$20.

otherannualcosts.label: Other Annual Costs
otherannualcosts.helper: Miscellaneous costs such as consumables, software licenses, etc.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for final rate.

workpiecematerial.label: Workpiece Material
workpiecematerial.helper: Material type determines recommended cutting speed range. Based on ISO 513 classification and machining handbooks (e.g., Machining Data Handbook, 3rd ed.).

toolmaterial.label: Tool Material
toolmaterial.helper: Tool material affects cutting speed capability. Higher hardness materials allow higher speeds. Reference: ISO 513.

operationtype.label: Operation Type
operationtype.helper: Different operations have different speed recommendations. Based on SME Tool Engineering Handbook.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed
cuttingspeed.helper: Actual cutting speed used. Must be within recommended range for material/tool combination. Reference: ISO 3685.

tooldiameter.label: Tool Diameter
tooldiameter.helper: Diameter of cutting tool (for milling/drilling). Affects spindle speed calculation. Reference: ISO 3002.

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed
spindlespeed.helper: Rotational speed of spindle. Calculated from cutting speed and diameter. Reference: ISO 230.

feedrate.label: Feed Rate
feedrate.helper: Feed per revolution. Affects surface finish and tool life. Reference: ISO 3685.

depthofcut.label: Depth of Cut
depthofcut.helper: Radial or axial depth. Influences cutting forces and power. Reference: ISO 3002.

toollife.label: Tool Life
toollife.helper: Expected tool life before replacement. Used for cost analysis. Reference: Taylor's tool life equation.

machinepower.label: Machine Power
machinepower.helper: Available spindle power. Must exceed required cutting power. Reference: ISO 3002.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts output reliability. Common in risk analysis.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cuttingspeed.helper: ISO 3685:1993 - Tool-life testing with single-point turning tools. Cutting speed is the relative velocity between the tool and workpiece, affecting tool life and surface finish.

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed (n)
spindlespeed.helper: Calculated from cutting speed and workpiece diameter. Standard machining practice per ISO 3002-1.

numberofteeth.label: Number of Teeth (z)
numberofteeth.helper: Number of cutting edges on the tool. Common for milling cutters; affects feed per tooth.

feedpertooth.label: Feed per Tooth (fz)
feedpertooth.helper: ISO 3002-1:1982 - Basic quantities in cutting and grinding. Determines chip load and surface finish.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material properties affect recommended cutting parameters. Based on Machining Data Handbook (Metcut) and ISO 513.

operationtype.label: Operation Type
operationtype.helper: Different operations have distinct feed rate formulas. Standard machining practice.

batchsize.label: Batch Size (units)
batchsize.helper: Total number of units started in the batch. Based on production planning standards (APICS).

goodunits.label: Good Units Output
goodunits.helper: Units meeting quality specifications. ISO 9001 quality metrics.

reworkunits.label: Rework Units
reworkunits.helper: Units that can be reworked to meet specs. Lean Six Sigma DMAIC.

scrapunits.label: Scrap Units
scrapunits.helper: Units that are scrapped. Waste reduction metrics (Lean).

costperunit.label: Cost per Unit ($)
costperunit.helper: Standard cost per unit including materials and labor. Managerial accounting.

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework Cost per Unit ($)
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional cost to rework a unit. Cost of quality (COQ) analysis.

sellingpriceperunit.label: Selling Price per Unit ($)
sellingpriceperunit.helper: Revenue per good unit sold. Pricing strategy.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

powerconsumption.label: Power Consumption
powerconsumption.helper: Average power consumption of equipment in kilowatts. Based on ISO 50001 energy management standards.

operatinghours.label: Operating Hours
operatinghours.helper: Total operating hours per billing period. Typically monthly or annually.

electricityrate.label: Electricity Rate
electricityrate.helper: Cost per kilowatt-hour from utility bill. Varies by region and tariff.

demandcharge.label: Demand Charge
demandcharge.helper: Peak demand charge per kW. Common in industrial tariffs.

peakdemand.label: Peak Demand
peakdemand.helper: Maximum power demand during billing period. Used for demand charge calculation.

timeperiod.label: Time Period
timeperiod.helper: Billing period for cost calculation. Common in utility billing cycles.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Used for risk-adjusted cost estimates.

monthlyconsumption.label: Monthly Consumption
monthlyconsumption.helper: Total electricity consumption per month in kilowatt-hours. Based on utility billing data.

tariffrate.label: Tariff Rate
tariffrate.helper: Price per kWh charged by utility. Varies by region and provider.

peakconsumption.label: Peak Consumption
peakconsumption.helper: Consumption during peak hours if time-of-use pricing applies.

taxrate.label: Tax Rate
taxrate.helper: Applicable tax percentage on electricity bill.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy.

energyconsumed.label: Energy Consumed
energyconsumed.helper: Total energy consumed in kilowatt-hours over the measurement period. Based on ISO 50001 energy management standard.

productionoutput.label: Production Output
productionoutput.helper: Total units produced in the same period. Used to calculate energy intensity per unit.

operatinghours.label: Operating Hours
operatinghours.helper: Total operating hours of the facility or equipment during the measurement period.

energycostperkwh.label: Energy Cost per kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Average cost of energy per kilowatt-hour. Used to calculate total energy cost.

baselineenergyintensity.label: Baseline Energy Intensity
baselineenergyintensity.helper: Industry benchmark or historical baseline energy intensity for comparison. Based on ISO 50001 energy performance indicators.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in the accuracy of input data. Affects adjustment of results. Low confidence reduces reliability.

activitytype.label: Activity Type
activitytype.helper: ISO 14064-1:2018 greenhouse gas accounting; EPA emission factors.

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.helper: Amount of activity (e.g., kWh for electricity, gallons for fuel, miles for travel).

unit.label: Unit
unit.helper: Unit matching the activity type; conversion factors from IPCC guidelines.

emissionfactor.label: Emission Factor (kg CO2e per unit)
emissionfactor.placeholder: Enter emission factor (kg co2e per unit)
emissionfactor.helper: Default factors from EPA eGRID or DEFRA; user can override for specific region.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Uncertainty adjustment per ISO 14064-3:2019; low confidence increases uncertainty margin.

includeoffset.label: Include Offsets
includeoffset.helper: If true, subtract purchased offsets from total emissions.

fueltype.label: Fuel Type
fueltype.helper: Fuel type determines emission factors per ISO 14064 and IPCC guidelines.

fuelconsumption.label: Fuel Consumption
fuelconsumption.helper: Total fuel consumed in liters. Source: operational records.

emissionfactor.label: Emission Factor
emissionfactor.helper: CO2 equivalent per liter. Default for diesel per IPCC 2006. For other fuels, user can override.

operatinghours.label: Operating Hours
operatinghours.helper: Hours of operation per day. Used for time-based calculations.

daysperyear.label: Days per Year
daysperyear.helper: Annual operating days. Standard industrial assumption.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Affects adjustment factor per ISO 14064 uncertainty guidance.

panelcapacity.label: Panel Capacity (STC)
panelcapacity.helper: Standard Test Condition (STC) rating per panel. Based on IEC 61215 standard.

irradiance.label: Average Daily Irradiance
irradiance.helper: Peak Sun Hours (PSH) based on location. Source: NASA SSE or NREL PVWatts.

systemlosses.label: System Losses
systemlosses.helper: Includes wiring, inverter, temperature, shading, soiling, etc. Typical range 10-20% per NREL.

degradationrate.label: Annual Degradation Rate
degradationrate.helper: Typical 0.5-1% per year per manufacturer warranty. Based on IEC 61215.

systemcost.label: Total System Cost
systemcost.helper: Total installed cost after incentives. Used for ROI calculation.

inverterefficiency.label: Inverter Efficiency
inverterefficiency.helper: Typical 95-98% for modern inverters. Based on IEC 61683.

tiltangle.label: Tilt Angle
tiltangle.helper: Panel tilt from horizontal. Optimal = latitude. Source: ASHRAE.

azimuthangle.label: Azimuth Angle
azimuthangle.helper: Direction panel faces: 0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W. Optimal south in northern hemisphere.

ambienttemperature.label: Average Ambient Temperature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average daytime temperature during peak sun hours.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Adjusts output for uncertainty. Low = 0.8, Medium = 1.0, High = 1.1 multiplier.

surfacearea.label: Surface Area
surfacearea.helper: Total surface area of the object/pipe exposed to ambient. Based on ISO 12241:2008 for thermal insulation.

surfacetemperature.label: Surface Temperature
surfacetemperature.helper: Temperature of the outer surface of the insulation or object. Required for convective and radiative heat loss calculation.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temperature
ambienttemperature.helper: Temperature of surrounding air. Standard ambient conditions per ISO 6946.

windspeed.label: Wind Speed
windspeed.helper: Air velocity over surface. Affects convective heat transfer coefficient. Based on ASHRAE Handbook.

emissivity.label: Emissivity
emissivity.helper: Surface emissivity for radiative heat transfer. Typical values: oxidized steel 0.8, polished metal 0.1. Based on ASTM C1371.

insulationthickness.label: Insulation Thickness
insulationthickness.helper: Thickness of insulation layer. Used to compute thermal resistance. Based on ISO 12241.

insulationconductivity.label: Insulation Thermal Conductivity
insulationconductivity.helper: Thermal conductivity of insulation material. Typical: mineral wool 0.04, polyurethane 0.025. Based on ASTM C518.

operationhours.label: Operation Hours per Year
operationhours.helper: Annual operating hours. Used to calculate annual energy loss. Standard industrial assumption.

energycost.label: Energy Cost
energycost.helper: Cost of energy per kWh. Used to calculate financial loss. Based on local utility rates.

fueltype.label: Fuel Type
fueltype.helper: Fuel type determines heating value and combustion characteristics. Based on ASME PTC 4 and ISO 50001.

fuelconsumption.label: Fuel Consumption
fuelconsumption.helper: Mass or volumetric flow rate of fuel input. Essential for energy balance.

fuelheatingvalue.label: Fuel Heating Value (HHV)
fuelheatingvalue.helper: Higher Heating Value of fuel. Standard test methods ASTM D240 for liquids, ASTM D5865 for solids.

steamflow.label: Steam Flow Rate
steamflow.helper: Mass flow rate of steam produced. Key output parameter.

steamenthalpy.label: Steam Enthalpy
steamenthalpy.helper: Enthalpy of steam at operating pressure and temperature. From steam tables per ASME.

feedwaterenthalpy.label: Feedwater Enthalpy
feedwaterenthalpy.helper: Enthalpy of feedwater entering boiler. Typically at deaerator outlet temperature.

excessair.label: Excess Air Percentage
excessair.helper: Excess air used for combustion. Affects flue gas losses. Typical range 10-50%.

fluegastemperature.label: Flue Gas Exit Temperature
fluegastemperature.helper: Temperature of flue gases leaving boiler. Higher temperature increases losses.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temperature
ambienttemperature.helper: Reference ambient temperature for heat loss calculations.

radiationloss.label: Radiation and Convection Loss
radiationloss.helper: Heat loss from boiler surface. Typically 1-3% of input energy.

blowdownrate.label: Blowdown Rate
blowdownrate.helper: Percentage of boiler water discharged to control solids. Affects efficiency.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability.

compressorpower.label: Compressor Power
compressorpower.helper: Nominal power rating of the compressor motor. Based on ISO 1217 standard for compressor performance testing.

loadfactor.label: Load Factor
loadfactor.helper: Percentage of time the compressor operates at full load. Typical values from compressed air system audits (ISO 11011).

operatinghoursperday.label: Operating Hours per Day
operatinghoursperday.helper: Daily operating hours. Based on shift patterns and production schedules.

operatingdaysperyear.label: Operating Days per Year
operatingdaysperyear.helper: Annual operating days. Typical for industrial facilities.

electricitycost.label: Electricity Cost
electricitycost.helper: Average electricity price. Based on local utility rates or EIA data.

motorefficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motorefficiency.helper: Efficiency of the electric motor. Based on NEMA MG1 or IEC 60034 standards.

compressortype.label: Compressor Type
compressortype.helper: Type of compressor affects maintenance and efficiency factors. Based on ISO 5390 classification.

maintenancefactor.label: Maintenance Factor
maintenancefactor.helper: Additional energy loss due to poor maintenance (e.g., leaks, dirty filters). Based on DOE compressed air guidelines.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk-adjusted outputs.

sector.label: Sector
sector.helper: CBAM sectors as defined in EU Regulation 2023/956. Select the sector of the product.

productionvolume.label: Annual Production Volume
productionvolume.helper: Total annual production volume of the product in tonnes. Required for calculating embedded emissions.

embeddedemissionsperton.label: Embedded Emissions per Tonne
embeddedemissionsperton.helper: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions embedded in one tonne of product, measured in tonnes of CO2 equivalent. Based on ISO 14064 and GHG Protocol.

carbonpriceorigin.label: Carbon Price in Origin Country
carbonpriceorigin.placeholder: Enter carbon price in origin country
carbonpriceorigin.helper: Current carbon price applicable in the country of origin. If no carbon price, enter 0. Based on World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard.

cbamcertificateprice.label: CBAM Certificate Price (EU ETS)
cbamcertificateprice.helper: Current price of CBAM certificates, linked to EU ETS allowance price. Source: European Energy Exchange (EEX).

freeallowancefactor.label: Free Allowance Factor
freeallowancefactor.helper: Percentage of emissions covered by free allowances during the transitional period. Default 0% for full exposure. Based on CBAM regulation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in the input data. Low: estimated, Medium: industry average, High: verified. Affects confidence adjustment.

distance.label: Distance Traveled
distance.helper: Total distance traveled by the vehicle. Based on standard odometer readings.

fuelused.label: Fuel Used
fuelused.helper: Volume of fuel consumed during the trip. Measured at pump.

fueltype.label: Fuel Type
fueltype.helper: Type of fuel used. Affects energy density and CO2 emission factors. Reference: ISO 14064.

vehicletype.label: Vehicle Type
vehicletype.helper: Vehicle category for benchmarking. Reference: EPA fuel economy standards.

drivingcondition.label: Driving Condition
drivingcondition.helper: Driving pattern affects fuel efficiency. City driving has lower efficiency due to stops.

loadfactor.label: Load Factor
loadfactor.helper: Percentage of maximum load capacity. Higher load increases fuel consumption. Reference: ISO 50001.

maintenancescore.label: Maintenance Score
maintenancescore.helper: Vehicle maintenance condition (0=poor, 100=excellent). Poor maintenance increases fuel use. Reference: Lean TPM.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Used to adjust output reliability.

fuelprice.label: Fuel Price per Unit
fuelprice.helper: Current market price per liter or kWh. Source: local fuel price indices.

fueltype.label: Fuel Type
fueltype.helper: Fuel type determines energy density and cost per unit. Based on standard fuel classifications (ASTM D975 for diesel, ASTM D4814 for gasoline).

fuelconsumption.label: Fuel Consumption
fuelconsumption.helper: Average fuel consumption per 100 km. For electric vehicles, use kWh/100km. Based on EPA fuel economy testing procedures.

distance.label: Distance Traveled
distance.helper: Total distance traveled in the period. Used to calculate total fuel used.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: Currency for cost output. ISO 4217 currency codes.

period.label: Period
period.helper: Time period for cost calculation. Used to scale distance if needed (e.g., monthly distance).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted output. Based on data quality assessment (ISO 8000).

length.label: Length
length.helper: Physical dimension of the package. Used to calculate volumetric weight. Standard: ISO 6780.

width.label: Width
width.helper: Physical dimension of the package. Used to calculate volumetric weight. Standard: ISO 6780.

height.label: Height
height.helper: Physical dimension of the package. Used to calculate volumetric weight. Standard: ISO 6780.

weight.label: Actual Weight
weight.helper: Actual weight of the package. Used to compare with volumetric weight for chargeable weight determination.

dimfactor.label: Dimensional Factor
dimfactor.helper: Conversion factor used by carriers (e.g., 5000 for air freight, 6000 for road). Standard: IATA for air, CEN for road.

mode.label: Transport Mode
mode.helper: Transport mode affects the dimensional factor and cost structure. Standard: IATA for air, CEN for road.

distancekm.label: Distance (km)
distancekm.helper: Total route distance in kilometers. Standard unit for transportation distance.

fuelconsumptionperkm.label: Fuel Consumption (L/km)
fuelconsumptionperkm.helper: Average fuel consumption per kilometer. Based on vehicle specifications or historical data.

fuelpriceperliter.label: Fuel Price ($/L)
fuelpriceperliter.helper: Current fuel price per liter. Market rate.

driverhourlyrate.label: Driver Hourly Rate ($/h)
driverhourlyrate.helper: Driver wage per hour. Includes benefits and overhead.

averagespeedkmh.label: Average Speed (km/h)
averagespeedkmh.helper: Expected average speed including traffic and stops.

tollcost.label: Toll Cost ($)
tollcost.helper: Total toll fees for the route.

maintenancecostperkm.label: Maintenance Cost ($/km)
maintenancecostperkm.helper: Vehicle maintenance cost per kilometer. Based on fleet data.

loadweighttons.label: Load Weight (tons)
loadweighttons.helper: Total cargo weight in tons. Affects fuel consumption and wear.

costpertonkm.label: Cost per Ton-km ($/ton-km)
costpertonkm.helper: Benchmark cost per ton-kilometer for comparison.

distancekm.label: Distance (km)
distancekm.helper: Total delivery distance. Based on standard logistics metrics (WERC).

weightkg.label: Weight (kg)
weightkg.helper: Package weight. Influences fuel consumption and handling cost. ISO 9001 quality standards.

volumem3.label: Volume (m³)
volumem3.helper: Package volume. Used for dimensional weight pricing. Industry standard (IATA, UPS).

deliverymode.label: Delivery Mode
deliverymode.helper: Service level. Express and same-day incur premium. Based on logistics service tiers.

fuelcostperliter.label: Fuel Cost per Liter
fuelcostperliter.helper: Current fuel price. Major variable cost. Source: local fuel index.

vehicleefficiency.label: Vehicle Efficiency (km/L)
vehicleefficiency.helper: Fuel economy of delivery vehicle. ISO 50001 energy management.

laborrateperhour.label: Labor Rate per Hour
laborrateperhour.helper: Driver wage including benefits. Based on industry benchmarks (BLS).

deliverytimehours.label: Delivery Time (hours)
deliverytimehours.helper: Total time from dispatch to delivery. Affects labor cost. Lean time measurement.

numstops.label: Number of Stops
numstops.helper: Number of delivery points. Affects time and fuel. Route optimization metric.

handlingcostperkg.label: Handling Cost per kg
handlingcostperkg.helper: Warehouse and loading cost. Based on activity-based costing (ABC).

insurancerate.label: Insurance Rate (% of value)
insurancerate.helper: Insurance premium as percentage of cargo value. Risk management standard.

cargovalue.label: Cargo Value
cargovalue.helper: Declared value of goods. Used for insurance calculation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Quality of input data. Adjusts final cost for uncertainty. Six Sigma data integrity.

shipmentweight.label: Shipment Weight
shipmentweight.helper: Total weight of the shipment. Standard unit for freight cost calculation per ISO 9001 and industry practice.

distance.label: Distance
distance.helper: Transportation distance. Key driver of fuel and time costs; used in cost-per-mile models.

mode.label: Transport Mode
mode.helper: Mode of transport affects cost structure, speed, and capacity. Based on logistics industry standards (WERC).

fuelprice.label: Fuel Price
fuelprice.helper: Current fuel price per liter. Major variable cost component; sensitive to market fluctuations.

laborrate.label: Labor Rate
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for drivers and handlers. Based on regional labor market data.

handlingcostperkg.label: Handling Cost per kg
handlingcostperkg.helper: Cost for loading/unloading and warehousing per kg. Derived from warehouse operations standards (WERC).

insurancerate.label: Insurance Rate
insurancerate.helper: Insurance premium as percentage of cargo value. Standard risk management practice.

cargovalue.label: Cargo Value
cargovalue.helper: Declared value of goods for insurance and customs. Required for insurance cost calculation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used to adjust final cost for uncertainty (e.g., ±10% range).

croptype.label: Crop Type
croptype.helper: Different crops have different nutrient requirements. Based on FAO guidelines and agronomic standards.

soilnitrogen.label: Soil Nitrogen (ppm)
soilnitrogen.helper: Measured via soil test. Typical range 0-200 ppm. Based on ISO 11261 standard for soil nitrogen determination.

soilphosphorus.label: Soil Phosphorus (ppm)
soilphosphorus.helper: Measured via soil test. Typical range 0-100 ppm. Based on Bray-1 or Olsen methods.

soilpotassium.label: Soil Potassium (ppm)
soilpotassium.helper: Measured via soil test. Typical range 0-500 ppm. Based on ammonium acetate extraction.

targetyield.label: Target Yield (kg/ha)
targetyield.helper: Desired yield per hectare. Based on crop potential and historical data.

fertilizertype.label: Fertilizer Type
fertilizertype.helper: Different fertilizers have different nutrient concentrations. Based on industry standard formulations.

applicationmethod.label: Application Method
applicationmethod.helper: Affects efficiency and dosage. Based on agronomic practices.

efficiencyfactor.label: Efficiency Factor (%)
efficiencyfactor.helper: Fraction of applied nutrient taken up by crop. Typical 50-90% depending on method and conditions.

targetplantpopulation.label: Target Plant Population (plants/ha)
targetplantpopulation.helper: Desired number of plants per hectare at harvest. Based on agronomic recommendations for specific crop and region.

germinationrate.label: Germination Rate (%)
germinationrate.helper: Percentage of seeds expected to germinate. Determined by seed lot testing (ISTA standards).

seedlingsurvivalrate.label: Seedling Survival Rate (%)
seedlingsurvivalrate.helper: Percentage of germinated seeds that survive to establish. Accounts for field conditions, pests, etc.

thousandseedweight.label: Thousand Seed Weight (g)
thousandseedweight.helper: Weight of 1000 seeds in grams. Varies by crop variety; used to convert seed count to weight.

rowspacing.label: Row Spacing (cm)
rowspacing.helper: Distance between rows. Affects plant density and seed rate calculation.

seedcostperkg.label: Seed Cost per kg ($)
seedcostperkg.helper: Cost of seed per kilogram. Used for economic analysis.

fieldarea.label: Field Area (ha)
fieldarea.helper: Total area to be planted. Used to calculate total seed required and cost.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (%)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts final recommendation for risk.

irrigationtype.label: Irrigation Type
irrigationtype.helper: Selecting irrigation type affects water usage efficiency and energy requirements. Based on FAO irrigation guidelines.

areahectares.label: Irrigated Area (ha)
areahectares.helper: Total area under irrigation. Standard unit in agriculture (hectares).

watersource.label: Water Source
watersource.helper: Water source influences pumping cost and water price. Based on typical agricultural water sources.

watervolumeperhectare.label: Water Volume per Hectare (m³/ha)
watervolumeperhectare.helper: Annual water requirement per hectare. Varies by crop and climate. FAO standard range.

pumphead.label: Pump Head (m)
pumphead.helper: Total dynamic head for pumping. Affects energy cost. Typical range for irrigation pumps.

pumpefficiency.label: Pump Efficiency (%)
pumpefficiency.helper: Efficiency of the pump. Standard range from pump manufacturers (ISO 9906).

energycostperkwh.label: Energy Cost ($/kWh)
energycostperkwh.helper: Cost of electricity. Typical US industrial rate (EIA data).

watercostperm3.label: Water Cost ($/m³)
watercostperm3.helper: Cost of water if purchased. For groundwater, may be zero. Based on local water rates.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost ($/hour)
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage for irrigation labor. Typical agricultural wage.

laborhoursperhectare.label: Labor Hours per Hectare (hours/ha)
laborhoursperhectare.helper: Annual labor hours per hectare for irrigation management. Varies by system type.

maintenancecostperhectare.label: Maintenance Cost ($/ha)
maintenancecostperhectare.helper: Annual maintenance cost per hectare. Includes repairs and parts.

systemlifeyears.label: System Life (years)
systemlifeyears.helper: Expected lifespan of irrigation system. Typical range for drip/sprinkler systems.

capitalcostperhectare.label: Capital Cost ($/ha)
capitalcostperhectare.helper: Initial investment cost per hectare. Varies by system type. Based on industry benchmarks.

discountrate.label: Discount Rate (%)
discountrate.helper: Discount rate for NPV calculation. Typical agricultural project rate (World Bank).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Used for adjusted outputs. Standard risk assessment practice.

priceperkg.label: Price per kg
priceperkg.helper: Market price of feed ingredient. Sourced from commodity exchanges or supplier contracts.

feedtype.label: Feed Type
feedtype.helper: Type of feed ingredient; affects nutritional value and cost. Based on animal nutrition standards (NRC).

quantityperday.label: Quantity per Day
quantityperday.helper: Daily feed consumption per animal or per herd. Derived from production records.

numberofanimals.label: Number of Animals
numberofanimals.helper: Total animals being fed. Essential for scaling cost.

feedingdays.label: Feeding Days
feedingdays.helper: Duration of feeding period. Typically a production cycle or a year.

wastepercentage.label: Waste Percentage
wastepercentage.helper: Estimated feed waste due to spoilage, spillage, or inefficiency. Based on industry benchmarks (e.g., 5-10% typical).

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage for feeding labor. Includes wages and benefits.

laborhoursperday.label: Labor Hours per Day
laborhoursperday.helper: Daily labor hours dedicated to feeding operations.

transportcostperkg.label: Transport Cost per kg
transportcostperkg.helper: Cost to transport feed from supplier to farm. Varies by distance and mode.

storagecostperkg.label: Storage Cost per kg
storagecostperkg.helper: Cost for storing feed (silos, warehouses). Includes depreciation and utilities.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

totalmilkproduced.label: Total Milk Produced (L)
totalmilkproduced.helper: Total volume of milk produced over the measurement period. Essential for yield calculation. Source: Dairy industry standards (IDF).

totalfeedconsumed.label: Total Feed Consumed (kg DM)
totalfeedconsumed.helper: Total dry matter feed consumed by the herd. Key input for feed conversion efficiency. Source: NRC dairy nutrition guidelines.

numberofcows.label: Number of Lactating Cows
numberofcows.helper: Count of cows in lactation during the period. Used to normalize yield per cow. Standard dairy metric.

measurementperioddays.label: Measurement Period (days)
measurementperioddays.helper: Duration over which milk and feed data are collected. Allows daily yield calculation. Common periods: 30 days (monthly), 365 days (annual).

milkfatpercent.label: Milk Fat (%)
milkfatpercent.helper: Average milk fat percentage. Used to calculate energy-corrected milk (ECM) for standardized yield. Reference: IDF standard.

milkproteinpercent.label: Milk Protein (%)
milkproteinpercent.helper: Average milk protein percentage. Used in ECM calculation. Standard dairy metric.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
