shrinkagepercent.helper: Shrinkage loss after wash or finish.

dyereworkcost.label: Dye rework cost
dyereworkcost.helper: Dye batch rework and shade correction spend.

jobrevenue.label: Job revenue
jobrevenue.helper: Quoted or invoiced revenue for the print job.

reprintratepercent.label: Reprint rate
reprintratepercent.helper: Reprint and spoilage as percent of material cost.

designrevisionhours.label: Design revision hours
designrevisionhours.helper: Artwork and revision labor expected on the job.

laborrate.label: Labor rate
laborrate.helper: Fully loaded design and production labor rate.

totalprintvolume.label: Total Print Volume
totalprintvolume.helper: Total number of printed units in the period. Based on production records (ISO 9001).

reprintvolume.label: Reprint Volume
reprintvolume.helper: Number of units reprinted due to defects or errors. Key metric in Lean manufacturing (defect rate).

unitprice.label: Unit Price
unitprice.helper: Selling price per unit. Standard financial input.

unitcost.label: Unit Cost
unitcost.helper: Variable cost per unit (materials, labor, overhead). Based on cost accounting standards.

reprintcostfactor.label: Reprint Cost Factor
reprintcostfactor.helper: Multiplier for cost of reprint vs. original run (e.g., due to setup waste). Industry benchmark: 1.2-2.0.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment of results. Based on Six Sigma data quality assessment.

monthlyrepairrevenue.label: Monthly repair revenue

hourlyfacilitycost.helper: Cost of lost productivity or revenue per hour of facility downtime. Based on business impact analysis.

dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Low = ±20%, Medium = ±10%, High = ±5%. Used for risk adjustment.

dailycrewcost.label: Daily crew cost

weatherdelaydays.label: Weather delay days

dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data quality. Affects adjustment of final risk estimate. Based on data governance standards.

jobrevenue.label: Job revenue

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment. Based on data quality assessment frameworks.

targetmilkliterspercowperday.helper: Target or benchmark yield per cow per day.

dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment.

dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Affects risk adjustment in final rate.

discountpercent.helper: Optional discount on total quote (e.g., loyalty or promotional discount).

customertype.helper: Determines pricing tier. Insurance jobs may have negotiated rates. Based on industry practice.

carbonprice.label: Carbon price

dataconfidence.helper: Subjective assessment of input data quality. Affects confidence adjustment.

monthlybenefits.label: Monthly benefits

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Facilities, utilities, admin support. Common allocation method.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working Days per Year

productivityrate.label: Productivity Rate
productivityrate.helper: Percentage of paid time actually productive. Lean metric.

downtimeminutes.label: Downtime minutes

hourlyrate.label: Shop hourly rate

hourlycostrate.label: Hourly Cost Rate

dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output for uncertainty. Common in risk analysis (ISO 31000).

revenue.helper: Customer or SKU revenue in the period.

servicecost.label: Service cost
servicecost.helper: Support, delivery rework and account service load.

returnscost.label: Returns cost
returnscost.helper: Returns, credits and rework tied to the account.

revenueperunit.label: Revenue per Unit
revenueperunit.helper: Average selling price per unit. Based on standard cost accounting principles (Horngren).

unitssold.label: Units Sold
unitssold.helper: Total quantity sold to customer over analysis period. From sales records.

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Cost per Unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Direct materials, direct labor, variable overhead per unit. Based on standard costing (ABC).

fixedcostallocation.label: Fixed Cost Allocation
fixedcostallocation.helper: Allocated fixed costs (e.g., factory rent, equipment depreciation) for this product-customer. Based on activity-based costing (Kaplan).

customerspecificcosts.label: Customer-Specific Costs
customerspecificcosts.helper: Costs directly attributable to customer (e.g., special packaging, logistics, sales support). From customer profitability analysis (Shapiro).

discountsandallowances.label: Discounts and Allowances
discountsandallowances.helper: Price discounts, trade allowances, rebates given to customer. Standard in trade spend analysis.

returnrate.label: Return Rate
returnrate.helper: Percentage of units returned by customer. Based on quality metrics (Six Sigma).

costofcapital.label: Cost of Capital
costofcapital.helper: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) for the firm. Standard finance (Brealey & Myers).

averagecollectionperiod.label: Average Collection Period
averagecollectionperiod.helper: Days sales outstanding for this customer. From accounts receivable aging.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment (ISO 31000).

annualdemand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annualdemand.helper: Total quantity of product demanded per year. Based on APICS/SCOR standards for demand planning.

ordercost.label: Order cost
ordercost.helper: Fixed cost per purchase order placed.

unitcost.label: Unit Cost ($)
unitcost.helper: Purchase cost per unit. Used to compute total inventory value and carrying cost as percentage of unit cost.

carryingcostpercent.label: Carrying cost rate
carryingcostpercent.helper: Annual carrying cost as percent of inventory value.

orderingcost.label: Ordering Cost per Order ($)
orderingcost.helper: Fixed cost incurred per order (e.g., administrative, shipping). Referenced in EOQ model by Harris (1913) and widely used in inventory management.

holdingcostperunitperyear.label: Holding Cost per Unit per Year ($)
holdingcostperunitperyear.placeholder: Enter holding cost per unit per year ($)
holdingcostperunitperyear.helper: Cost to hold one unit of inventory for one year, including storage, insurance, obsolescence. Based on standard inventory carrying cost calculations (APICS).

carryingcostrate.label: Carrying Cost Rate (% of unit cost per year)
carryingcostrate.placeholder: Enter carrying cost rate (% of unit cost per year)
carryingcostrate.helper: Annual carrying cost as a percentage of unit cost. Typical range 15-30% per year (industry benchmarks from WERC, APICS).

leadtimedays.label: Lead Time (days)
leadtimedays.helper: Time from order placement to receipt. Used for reorder point calculation. Standard in inventory management.

safetystock.label: Safety Stock (units)
safetystock.helper: Extra inventory held to mitigate uncertainty in demand or lead time. Based on service level and demand variability (Six Sigma).

workingdaysperyear.label: Working Days per Year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Number of operating days per year. Used to convert lead time to annual demand rate. Standard assumption.

weldlengthmm.label: Weld length
weldlengthmm.helper: Continuous weld length along the joint.

boltcount.label: Bolt count
boltcount.helper: Number of bolts sharing the load path.

allowablestressmpa.label: Allowable stress
allowablestressmpa.helper: Workshop reference allowable stress for screening.

safetyfactor.label: Safety factor
safetyfactor.helper: Design safety factor applied to allowable stress.

assemblylimit.label: Assembly limit
assemblylimit.helper: Maximum allowable stack for the assembly chain.

clampforcekn.label: Clamp force
clampforcekn.helper: Target clamp or preload force for the joint.

frictionfactor.label: Friction factor
frictionfactor.helper: Nut factor K for dry steel (typical 0.15–0.25).

boltdiameter.label: Bolt Diameter
boltdiameter.helper: ISO 898-1: Mechanical properties of fasteners. Bolt diameter is a primary factor in torque calculation.

threadpitch.label: Thread Pitch
threadpitch.helper: ISO 68-1: Basic profile of metric screw threads. Affects torque-tension relationship.

frictioncoefficient.label: Friction Coefficient
frictioncoefficient.helper: VDI 2230: Systematic calculation of high duty bolted joints. Typical values: 0.10-0.20 for lubricated, 0.15-0.30 for dry.

preloadforce.label: Preload Force
preloadforce.helper: Target clamping force required for joint integrity. Based on joint design and service loads.

nutfactor.label: Nut Factor (K)
nutfactor.helper: Empirical factor combining thread and underhead friction. Typical K=0.2 for as-received condition per SAE J1701.

torquemethod.label: Torque Method
torquemethod.helper: ISO 16047: Tightening torque test methods. Torque control is most common; torque-angle provides higher accuracy.

lubricationcondition.label: Lubrication Condition
lubricationcondition.helper: Affects friction coefficient. Per VDI 2230: dry (0.15-0.30), oiled (0.10-0.20), coated (0.05-0.12).

protectedaream2.label: Protected area
protectedaream2.helper: Design area covered by the hydrant network.

designdensitylpmm2.label: Design density
designdensitylpmm2.helper: Reference design density for the occupancy class.

hydrantcapacitylpm.label: Hydrant capacity
hydrantcapacitylpm.helper: Available flow per hydrant at required pressure.

buildingtype.label: Building Type
buildingtype.helper: Based on NFPA 13 and local fire codes; building type determines required flow density and area.

hazardclassification.label: Hazard Classification
hazardclassification.helper: Per NFPA 13, hazard classification affects design density and area of operation.

sprinklercoveragearea.label: Sprinkler Coverage Area
sprinklercoveragearea.helper: Typical coverage area per sprinkler head; varies by spacing and hazard (NFPA 13).

numberofsprinklers.label: Number of Sprinklers
numberofsprinklers.helper: Total sprinklers in the design area; used to calculate total flow demand.

designdensity.label: Design Density
designdensity.helper: Required water density per NFPA 13 based on hazard classification; typical range 0.05-0.6 gpm/sq ft.

hydrantflowrate.label: Hydrant Flow Rate
hydrantflowrate.helper: Available flow from hydrant; typical municipal supply ranges 500-2500 gpm.

numberofhydrants.label: Number of Hydrants
numberofhydrants.helper: Number of hydrants available for firefighting; affects total supply capacity.

simultaneoushydrantdemand.label: Simultaneous Hydrant Demand
simultaneoushydrantdemand.helper: Expected demand per hydrant during fire; typical 500-1500 gpm per hydrant.

frictionlossfactor.label: Friction Loss Factor
frictionlossfactor.helper: Friction loss in piping per 100 ft; depends on pipe material and diameter (Hazen-Williams).

pipelength.label: Pipe Length
pipelength.helper: Total length of pipe from source to farthest sprinkler/hydrant.

elevationchange.label: Elevation Change
elevationchange.helper: Positive if uphill; affects pressure due to elevation head (0.433 psi/ft).

requiredpressureatoutlet.label: Required Pressure at Outlet
requiredpressureatoutlet.helper: Minimum pressure required at sprinkler or hydrant outlet; typical 50 psi.

watersupplypressure.label: Water Supply Pressure
watersupplypressure.helper: Static pressure at water source; typical municipal supply 40-100 psi.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data; used to adjust final results for uncertainty.

pressurebar.label: System pressure
pressurebar.helper: Working pressure at the cylinder port.

rodmm.label: Rod diameter
rodmm.helper: Rod diameter for retract force (optional screening).

pressure.label: Pressure
pressure.helper: Operating pressure of the hydraulic or pneumatic system. Typical range: 1-350 bar for hydraulics, 1-10 bar for pneumatics. Based on ISO 4414 (pneumatics) and ISO 4413 (hydraulics).

pistondiameter.label: Piston Diameter
pistondiameter.helper: Diameter of the cylinder piston. Standard sizes per ISO 3320 (hydraulic/pneumatic cylinders).

roddiameter.label: Rod Diameter
roddiameter.helper: Diameter of the piston rod. Affects effective area on retraction stroke. Standard sizes per ISO 3320.

cylindertype.label: Cylinder Type
cylindertype.helper: Single-acting cylinders use pressure on one side only; double-acting use pressure on both sides. Common in industrial applications per ISO 6020/6022.

fluidtype.label: Fluid Type
fluidtype.helper: Hydraulic uses incompressible oil; pneumatic uses compressible air. Affects force calculation (pneumatic may have pressure drop due to compressibility).

efficiency.label: Efficiency
efficiency.helper: Mechanical efficiency accounting for friction losses. Typical 80-95% for hydraulic cylinders, 70-90% for pneumatic. Based on manufacturer data and ISO 4391.

preventioncost.label: Prevention Costs
preventioncost.helper: Costs of activities to prevent defects (e.g., training, process control). Based on PAF model (ISO 9001).

appraisalcost.label: Appraisal Costs
appraisalcost.helper: Costs of inspection and testing to detect defects. PAF model.

failurecost.label: Failure cost
failurecost.helper: Scrap, rework, warranty and downtime from defects.

totalsales.label: Total Sales Revenue
totalsales.helper: Annual total sales revenue. Used as basis for cost ratios. Standard financial metric.

internalfailurecost.label: Internal Failure Costs
internalfailurecost.helper: Costs from defects found before delivery (scrap, rework). PAF model.

externalfailurecost.label: External Failure Costs
externalfailurecost.helper: Costs from defects found after delivery (warranty, returns). PAF model.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final result for uncertainty.

designpressurebar.label: Design pressure
designpressurebar.helper: Internal design pressure for the vessel.

diametermm.label: Inside diameter
diametermm.helper: Nominal inside diameter of the shell.

allowablestressmpa.label: Allowable stress
allowablestressmpa.helper: Material allowable stress at design temperature.

designpressure.label: Design Pressure (Internal)
designpressure.helper: Maximum allowable working pressure per ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UG-21.

vesselinnerradius.label: Vessel Inner Radius
vesselinnerradius.helper: Inner radius of cylindrical shell per ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UG-27.

allowablestress.label: Allowable Stress of Material
allowablestress.helper: Maximum allowable stress value per ASME BPVC Section II Part D, Table 1A.

jointefficiency.label: Joint Efficiency (Longitudinal)
jointefficiency.helper: Efficiency of welded joints per ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UW-12. Values correspond to joint categories and degree of radiography.

corrosionallowance.label: Corrosion Allowance
corrosionallowance.helper: Additional thickness to account for corrosion over design life per ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UG-25.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material classification for corrosion allowance and stress values.

processminutes.label: Process time
processminutes.helper: Total value-added processing minutes in the stream.

proposedkwhmonthly.label: Proposed monthly kWh
proposedkwhmonthly.helper: Expected monthly use after the savings package.

projectcost.label: Project cost
projectcost.helper: Total capex for the efficiency package.

annualenergyconsumption.label: Annual Energy Consumption
annualenergyconsumption.helper: Total annual energy usage of the facility. Based on ISO 50001 energy baseline.

energycostperkwh.label: Energy Cost per kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Average cost of electricity. Varies by region and tariff.

peakdemand.label: Peak Demand
peakdemand.helper: Maximum power demand in kW. Used for demand charge calculations.

demandchargeperkw.label: Demand Charge per kW
demandchargeperkw.helper: Monthly demand charge rate from utility.

operatinghoursperday.label: Operating Hours per Day
operatinghoursperday.helper: Daily operating hours of the facility.

operatingdaysperyear.label: Operating Days per Year
operatingdaysperyear.helper: Number of operating days per year.

energysavingspercentage.label: Expected Energy Savings Percentage
energysavingspercentage.helper: Estimated percentage reduction in energy consumption from proposed measures.

peakdemandreductionpercentage.label: Peak Demand Reduction Percentage
peakdemandreductionpercentage.helper: Estimated percentage reduction in peak demand.

implementationcost.label: Implementation Cost
implementationcost.helper: Total upfront cost for energy saving measures.

maintenancecostincreaseperyear.label: Annual Maintenance Cost Increase
maintenancecostincreaseperyear.helper: Additional annual maintenance cost due to new equipment.

discountrate.label: Discount Rate
discountrate.helper: Discount rate for NPV calculation. Typically company's WACC.

projectlifeyears.label: Project Life (Years)
projectlifeyears.helper: Expected useful life of the energy saving measures.

inflationrate.label: Inflation Rate
inflationrate.helper: Expected annual inflation rate for energy costs.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment
initialinvestment.helper: Total upfront cost including equipment, installation, and training. Based on capital budgeting standards (CAPM, NPV).

discountratepercent.label: Discount rate
discountratepercent.helper: Required return or cost of capital.

annualcashinflow.label: Annual Cash Inflow
annualcashinflow.helper: Expected annual net cash inflow from the investment. Used in payback period and NPV calculations.

discountrate.label: Discount Rate
discountrate.helper: Required rate of return or cost of capital. Typically based on WACC or industry benchmark (e.g., CAPM).

projectlifeyears.label: Project Life (Years)
projectlifeyears.helper: Expected duration of the investment's cash flows. Used for NPV and IRR calculations.

salvagevalue.label: Salvage Value
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual value at end of project life. Included in final year cash flow for NPV.

annualoperatingcost.label: Annual Operating Cost
annualoperatingcost.helper: Recurring costs such as maintenance, labor, and utilities. Subtracted from cash inflow to get net cash flow.

taxrate.label: Tax Rate
taxrate.helper: Corporate tax rate applied to net income. Affects after-tax cash flows in NPV.

depreciationmethod.label: Depreciation Method
depreciationmethod.helper: Method for allocating depreciation expense. Straight-line is simplest; accelerated methods provide tax shield earlier.

inflationrate.label: Inflation Rate
inflationrate.helper: Expected annual inflation. Used to adjust nominal cash flows to real terms if needed.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data quality. Affects risk adjustment in final outputs.

grossmonthlysalary.label: Gross monthly salary
grossmonthlysalary.helper: Monthly gross pay used for screening.

yearsofservice.label: Years of Service
yearsofservice.helper: Total years employee has worked for the employer. Used in severance and leave accrual calculations.

severanceweeksperyear.label: Severance weeks per year
severanceweeksperyear.helper: Policy weeks credited per service year.

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary
annualsalary.helper: Employee's gross annual salary. Based on standard employment contracts.

monthsofservice.label: Additional Months of Service
monthsofservice.helper: Remaining months beyond full years. Used for prorated calculations.

leavedaysaccrued.label: Annual Leave Days Accrued
leavedaysaccrued.helper: Total annual leave days accrued but not taken. Based on company policy or labor law.

leavedaystaken.label: Annual Leave Days Taken
leavedaystaken.helper: Number of leave days already taken in the current period.

severancemultiplier.label: Severance Multiplier (weeks per year)
severancemultiplier.helper: Number of weeks of severance pay per year of service. Typically defined by labor law or contract.

noticeperiod.label: Notice Period
noticeperiod.helper: Length of notice period required before termination. Based on employment contract or statutory requirements.

workingdaysperweek.label: Working Days per Week
workingdaysperweek.helper: Standard working days per week. Used to convert weeks to days.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: Currency for monetary values. Allows localization.

centerdistancemm.label: Center distance
centerdistancemm.helper: Shaft center distance for open belt length.

driverpulleydiameter.label: Driver Pulley Diameter
driverpulleydiameter.helper: Diameter of the driving pulley. Standard belt drive design per ISO 5293.

drivenpulleydiameter.label: Driven Pulley Diameter
drivenpulleydiameter.helper: Diameter of the driven pulley. Standard belt drive design per ISO 5293.

centerdistance.label: Center Distance
centerdistance.helper: Distance between pulley centers. Affects belt length and tension.

driverspeed.label: Driver Speed
driverspeed.helper: Rotational speed of the driving pulley.

belttype.label: Belt Type
belttype.helper: Type of belt affects length calculation and speed ratio.

dailysitecost.label: Daily site cost
dailysitecost.helper: Crew, equipment and overhead per day on site.

laborbudget.label: Labor budget
laborbudget.helper: Planned labor spend for the scope.

laboroverrunpercent.label: Labor overrun
laboroverrunpercent.helper: Expected labor cost drift above budget.

materialbudget.label: Material budget
materialbudget.helper: Planned material spend for the scope.

materialoverrunpercent.label: Material overrun
materialoverrunpercent.helper: Expected material cost drift above budget.

changeordercount.label: Number of Change Orders
changeordercount.helper: Total number of change orders during the project. Based on PMBOK and earned value management standards.

averagecostperchangeorder.label: Average Cost per Change Order
averagecostperchangeorder.placeholder: Enter average cost per change order
averagecostperchangeorder.helper: Direct cost including labor, materials, and overhead. Referenced from industry benchmarks (e.g., PMI).

scheduledelayperchangeorder.label: Schedule Delay per Change Order
scheduledelayperchangeorder.placeholder: Enter schedule delay per change order
scheduledelayperchangeorder.helper: Average delay caused by each change order. Based on lean construction and project management data.

dailypenaltyrate.label: Daily Penalty Rate
dailypenaltyrate.helper: Contractual penalty per day of delay. Common in construction contracts.

reworklaborrate.label: Rework Labor Rate
reworklaborrate.helper: Hourly cost of labor for rework. Based on industry wage surveys.

reworkhoursperchangeorder.label: Rework Hours per Change Order
reworkhoursperchangeorder.placeholder: Enter rework hours per change order
reworkhoursperchangeorder.helper: Average labor hours required for rework per change order. Derived from Six Sigma DMAIC studies.

materialwastepercentage.label: Material Waste Percentage
materialwastepercentage.helper: Percentage of material wasted due to changes. Lean manufacturing waste reduction metrics.

totalmaterialcost.label: Total Material Cost
totalmaterialcost.helper: Total material budget for the project. Standard cost accounting.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead. Based on activity-based costing (ABC).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk-adjusted outputs. Common in Monte Carlo simulations.

ingredientcost.label: Ingredient cost
ingredientcost.helper: Total ingredient spend before waste adjustment.

wasterate.label: Waste rate
wasterate.helper: Spoilage and portion drift as percent of ingredient cost.

targetfoodcostpercent.label: Target food cost
targetfoodcostpercent.helper: Target food cost percent for this menu mix.

totalrevenue.label: Total Revenue
totalrevenue.helper: Total revenue from menu sales over the analysis period. Standard financial metric.

totalcostofgoodssold.label: Total Cost of Goods Sold
totalcostofgoodssold.placeholder: Enter total cost of goods sold
totalcostofgoodssold.helper: Total cost of ingredients and direct materials. Based on standard cost accounting.

totallaborcost.label: Total Labor Cost
totallaborcost.helper: Total labor cost including wages, benefits, and payroll taxes. Industry standard.

totaloverheadcost.label: Total Overhead Cost
totaloverheadcost.helper: Fixed and variable overhead costs (rent, utilities, equipment). Standard cost accounting.

totalwastecost.label: Total Waste Cost
totalwastecost.helper: Cost of wasted ingredients, spoiled items, and overproduction. Lean manufacturing waste reduction.

totaltheftcost.label: Total Theft Cost
totaltheftcost.helper: Estimated cost of inventory theft or shrinkage. Industry loss prevention.

totaldiscountsgiven.label: Total Discounts Given
totaldiscountsgiven.helper: Total value of discounts, promotions, and comps. Revenue management.

totalmenupriceerrors.label: Total Menu Price Errors
totalmenupriceerrors.helper: Revenue lost due to incorrect pricing or POS errors. Quality control.

analysisperioddays.label: Analysis Period (Days)
analysisperioddays.helper: Duration of the analysis period. Standard time frame for financial analysis.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in the accuracy of input data. Used for risk adjustment.

monthlyrent.label: Monthly rent
monthlyrent.helper: Monthly facility rent or occupancy cost.

unusedspacepercent.label: Unused space
unusedspacepercent.helper: Unused or under-utilized space as percent of rent.

handlingoverrunhours.label: Handling overrun hours
handlingoverrunhours.helper: Extra picking and handling hours per month.

totalsquarefeet.label: Total Square Feet
totalsquarefeet.helper: Total area to be cleaned. Standard industry metric for cleaning bids (ISSA, BSCAI).

frequencyperweek.label: Cleaning Frequency per Week
frequencyperweek.helper: Number of cleaning visits per week. Common range 1-7 (daily).

laborrateperhour.label: Labor Rate per Hour
laborrateperhour.helper: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Based on local minimum wage and market rates (BLS).

productivityfactor.label: Productivity Factor
productivityfactor.helper: Average area cleaned per person per hour. Industry benchmark 1500-2500 sq ft/hr (ISSA).

suppliescostpersqft.label: Supplies Cost per Sq Ft
suppliescostpersqft.placeholder: Enter supplies cost per sq ft
suppliescostpersqft.helper: Cost of cleaning supplies per square foot. Includes chemicals, paper, etc. (ISCA).

equipmentcostpersqft.label: Equipment Cost per Sq Ft
equipmentcostpersqft.placeholder: Enter equipment cost per sq ft
equipmentcostpersqft.helper: Amortized equipment cost per square foot (vacuum, mops, etc.).

overheadpercentage.label: Overhead Percentage
overheadpercentage.helper: Indirect costs as percentage of direct costs (management, insurance, etc.). Typical 15-30%.

profitmargintarget.label: Profit Margin Target
profitmargintarget.helper: Desired profit margin on total cost. Industry standard 10-20%.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

servicelevel.label: Service Level
servicelevel.helper: Quality tier: basic (light cleaning), standard (full cleaning), premium (deep cleaning).

dailycrewcost.label: Daily crew cost
dailycrewcost.helper: Loaded crew and equipment cost per site day.

weatherdelaydays.label: Weather delay days
weatherdelaydays.helper: Expected weather delay days on the contract.

warrantyreserve.label: Warranty reserve
warrantyreserve.helper: Warranty and callback reserve for the job.

contractvalue.label: Contract Value
contractvalue.helper: Total contract amount agreed with client. Based on industry standard landscaping contracts.

materialcost.label: Material Cost
materialcost.helper: Cost of plants, soil, mulch, hardscape materials. Typically 30-40% of contract value.

laborhours.label: Labor Hours
laborhours.helper: Total estimated labor hours for the project. Based on work breakdown structure.

hourlyrate.label: Hourly Labor Rate
hourlyrate.helper: Average wage including burden. Industry benchmark: $30-$50/hr.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment Cost
equipmentcost.helper: Rental or depreciation of machinery (mowers, excavators). Typically 10% of contract.

subcontractorcost.label: Subcontractor Cost
subcontractorcost.helper: Cost for specialized tasks (irrigation, lighting). If any.

overheadpercent.label: Overhead Percentage
overheadpercent.helper: Indirect costs (office, insurance, permits). Industry average 10-20%.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Reliability of input estimates. Low: rough, High: detailed takeoffs.

jobrevenue.label: Job revenue
jobrevenue.helper: Quoted or invoiced revenue for the print job.

materialcost.label: Material Cost per Unit
materialcost.helper: Direct material cost per signage unit. Based on standard cost accounting (ISO 9001).

reprintratepercent.label: Reprint rate
reprintratepercent.helper: Reprint and spoilage as percent of material cost.

designrevisionhours.label: Design revision hours
designrevisionhours.helper: Artwork and revision labor expected on the job.

laborrate.label: Labor rate
laborrate.helper: Fully loaded design and production labor rate.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly labor cost including wages and overhead. Industry standard from Maynard's Industrial Engineering Handbook.

laborhoursperunit.label: Labor Hours per Unit
laborhoursperunit.helper: Standard labor time per unit. Based on time studies (Lean/Six Sigma).

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead. Typical range 10-30% (WERC benchmarks).

profitmargin.label: Desired Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Target profit margin on total cost. Standard financial ratio (CAPM).

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.helper: Number of signage units in the bid. Volume affects economies of scale.

complexityfactor.label: Complexity Factor
complexityfactor.helper: Adjusts labor and material for design complexity. Based on ASTM E1699-14 standard for signage.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment (Six Sigma DMAIC).

monthlytoolcost.label: Monthly tool cost
monthlytoolcost.helper: Inserts, tooling and consumables spend per month.

partsproduced.label: Parts produced
partsproduced.helper: Good parts produced in the same period.

toolchangeminutes.label: Tool change minutes
toolchangeminutes.helper: Average minutes lost per tool change event.

changespermonth.label: Changes per month
changespermonth.helper: Tool change events in the period.

coolantcost.label: Coolant cost
coolantcost.helper: Coolant and lubricant spend tied to tooling.

projectrevenue.label: Project Revenue
projectrevenue.helper: Total contract value for the HVAC project. Based on industry practice for project budgeting.

ductworkvariance.label: Ductwork variance
ductworkvariance.helper: Extra duct material and labor versus estimate.

laborrate.label: Labor rate
laborrate.helper: Fully loaded HVAC field labor rate.

callbackriskpercent.label: Callback risk
callbackriskpercent.helper: Expected callback cost as percent of revenue.

materialcost.label: Material Cost
materialcost.helper: Cost of HVAC equipment and materials. Referenced from RSMeans cost data.

laborcost.label: Labor Cost
laborcost.helper: Direct labor cost for installation. Based on prevailing wage rates.

subcontractorcost.label: Subcontractor Cost
subcontractorcost.helper: Costs for subcontracted work (e.g., electrical, ductwork). Common in HVAC projects.

overheadpercent.label: Overhead Percent
overheadpercent.helper: Project overhead as percentage of direct costs. Typical range 5-15% per industry benchmarks.

contingencypercent.label: Contingency Percent
contingencypercent.helper: Contingency reserve as percentage of total direct costs. Recommended by PMI standards.

margintarget.label: Margin Target
margintarget.helper: Target profit margin for the project. Industry average 10-20% for HVAC.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted margin. Based on risk assessment practices.

machinerate.label: Machine rate
machinerate.helper: Loaded shop rate including operator burden.

plannedhours.label: Planned run hours
plannedhours.helper: Setup plus production hours on the job.

downtimehours.label: Expected downtime
downtimehours.helper: Tool changes, first-off inspection, minor stops.

materialcost.label: Material cost
materialcost.helper: Stock, fixturing consumables for the job.

scraprate.label: Scrap rate
scraprate.helper: Historical scrap percent for similar jobs.

quotedprice.label: Quoted price
quotedprice.helper: Price you plan to charge the customer.

materialcostperpart.label: Material Cost per Part
materialcostperpart.helper: Direct material cost per CNC part. Based on standard cost accounting (ISO 9001).

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage including overhead. Industry benchmark from APICS.

cycletimeminutes.label: Cycle Time per Part
cycletimeminutes.helper: Time to machine one part. Lean manufacturing standard (Maynard).

setuptimeminutes.label: Setup Time per Batch
setuptimeminutes.helper: Time to change tooling and fixtures. SMED methodology.

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of parts per production run. Economic order quantity (EOQ) concept.

defectrate.label: Defect Rate
defectrate.helper: Fraction of defective parts. Six Sigma quality metric (DPMO).

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Fraction of direct costs for overhead. Standard cost accounting (ISO 9001).

profitmargintarget.label: Profit Margin Target
profitmargintarget.helper: Desired profit margin. Financial planning standard.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Risk assessment factor.

machineutilization.label: Machine Utilization
machineutilization.helper: Fraction of time machine is productive. OEE metric (ISO 22400).

materialcost.label: Material cost
materialcost.helper: Sheet stock and material spend for the job or period.

scraprate.label: Scrap Rate

targetscraprate.label: Target scrap rate
targetscraprate.helper: Acceptable scrap target for similar jobs.

reworkhours.label: Rework hours
reworkhours.helper: Bend, fit-up and finishing rework hours expected.

laborrate.label: Labor rate
laborrate.helper: Fully loaded shop labor rate.

finishingcost.label: Finishing cost

materialcostperkg.label: Material Cost per kg

materialthickness.label: Material Thickness
materialthickness.helper: Standard sheet metal gauges; affects bending force and scrap rate. ASTM A568/A568M for steel sheet.

partarea.label: Part Area

annualvolume.label: Annual Volume

setuptimehours.label: Setup Time per Batch
setuptimehours.helper: Time to change dies and program CNC; SMED principles (Shigeo Shingo) for quick changeover.

cycletimeseconds.label: Cycle Time per Part

laborrateperhour.label: Labor Rate per Hour
laborrateperhour.helper: Average wage including overhead; based on industry benchmarks (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

machinerateperhour.label: Machine Rate per Hour
machinerateperhour.helper: Includes depreciation, maintenance, energy; ISO 50001 for energy cost allocation.

defectrate.label: Defect Rate
defectrate.helper: Percentage of non-conforming parts; ISO 9001 quality management. Threshold >5% triggers critical warning.

toolingcost.label: Tooling Cost
toolingcost.helper: One-time cost for dies and fixtures; amortized over annual volume. CAPEX evaluation.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Percentage of direct costs for indirect expenses (rent, utilities, admin). Activity-based costing.

profitmargintarget.label: Profit Margin Target
profitmargintarget.helper: Desired profit margin; used to calculate target price. Financial ratio analysis.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy; affects risk adjustment. Common in risk management frameworks.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Different materials have different costs, densities, and formability. ASTM material standards.

jobrevenue.label: Job Revenue
jobrevenue.helper: Total revenue from the plumbing job. Based on contract value.

callbackvisits.label: Callback visits
callbackvisits.helper: Expected leak or warranty return visits.

materialruncost.label: Material run cost
materialruncost.helper: Extra fittings, pipe and supply runs.

warrantyreservepercent.label: Warranty reserve
warrantyreservepercent.helper: Warranty reserve as percent of job revenue.

materialcost.label: Material Cost
materialcost.helper: Cost of materials used in the job. Includes pipes, fittings, fixtures.

laborhours.label: Labor Hours
laborhours.helper: Total labor hours spent on the job.

hourlyrate.label: Hourly Labor Rate
hourlyrate.helper: Average hourly wage including burden. Industry standard.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead. Based on company accounting.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment Cost
equipmentcost.helper: Cost of equipment rental or depreciation for the job.

warrantyreserve.label: Warranty Reserve
warrantyreserve.helper: Reserve for potential warranty claims. Typically 2-5% of revenue.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted margin.

expectedyieldtonperha.label: Expected yield

actualyieldtonperha.label: Actual yield
actualyieldtonperha.helper: Observed or projected yield per hectare.

priceperton.label: Price per ton
priceperton.helper: Market or contract price per ton.

irrigationcost.label: Irrigation cost
irrigationcost.helper: Season irrigation energy and water spend.

expectedyield.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)

actualyield.label: Actual Yield (kg/ha)

cropprice.label: Crop Price (USD/kg)

dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (0=low, 1=high); used for risk adjustment.

cows.helper: Milking herd size for the period.

milkliterspercowperday.label: Milk liters per cow per day

targetmilkliterspercowperday.label: Target milk liters per cow per day
targetmilkliterspercowperday.placeholder: Enter target milk liters per cow per day
targetmilkliterspercowperday.helper: Target or benchmark yield per cow per day.

milkpriceperliter.helper: Current market price of raw milk per liter. Source: USDA dairy market news.

milkvolumelitersperday.helper: Daily milk production volume. Standard industry metric for dairy farms.

numberofcows.helper: Total milking cows in herd. Determines scale.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Average hourly wage for farm labor. Includes benefits.

laborhoursperday.label: Labor Hours per Day
laborhoursperday.helper: Total daily labor hours for milking and farm operations.

energykwhperday.label: Energy Consumption per Day
energykwhperday.helper: Daily electricity usage for milking, cooling, etc.

watercostperliter.label: Water Cost per Liter
watercostperliter.helper: Cost of water per liter. Includes treatment.

waterlitersperday.label: Water Usage per Day
waterlitersperday.helper: Daily water consumption for cleaning and cows.

veterinarycostpercowperyear.label: Veterinary Cost per Cow per Year
veterinarycostpercowperyear.placeholder: Enter veterinary cost per cow per year
veterinarycostpercowperyear.helper: Annual veterinary expenses per cow. Health management.

replacementcostpercow.label: Replacement Cost per Cow
replacementcostpercow.helper: Cost to purchase a replacement heifer.

milkpricepremiumperliter.label: Milk Price Premium per Liter
milkpricepremiumperliter.placeholder: Enter milk price premium per liter
milkpricepremiumperliter.helper: Additional price for quality premiums (e.g., organic, A2).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

cows.helper: Milking herd size for the period.

feedcostpercowperday.label: Feed cost per cow per day

milkliterspercowperday.label: Milk liters per cow per day
milkliterspercowperday.placeholder: Enter milk liters per cow per day
milkliterspercowperday.helper: Observed milk yield per cow per day.

targetmilkliterspercowperday.label: Target milk liters per cow per day
targetmilkliterspercowperday.placeholder: Enter target milk liters per cow per day
targetmilkliterspercowperday.helper: Target or benchmark yield per cow per day.

milkpriceperliter.label: Milk price per liter
milkpriceperliter.helper: Net milk price received per liter.

feedintake.helper: Daily feed consumption per animal. Based on NRC (National Research Council) nutrient requirements.

weightgain.label: Weight Gain
weightgain.helper: Average daily weight gain per animal. Standard livestock performance metric.

feedcost.label: Feed Cost
feedcost.helper: Cost per kilogram of feed. Market price based on feed type.

animaltype.label: Animal Type
animaltype.helper: Species-specific feed efficiency benchmarks. Based on agricultural extension data.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

rejectionriskpercent.label: Rejection risk

materialcostperkg.label: Material Cost per kg

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Facility, administrative, and indirect costs as a percentage of direct costs. Standard cost accounting practice.

sellingprice.label: Selling Price per Job

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level

costperthousandcalls.label: Cost per 1k calls

costofgoodssold.helper: Direct costs attributable to production. Standard cost accounting.

defectrate.helper: Percentage of defective units. Six Sigma DMAIC metric. Threshold >0.05 triggers critical warning.

agvenergycostperhour.helper: Electricity cost for charging AGVs. Based on average industrial electricity rates and AGV power consumption.

agvlifespanyears.label: AGV Lifespan (Years)
agvlifespanyears.helper: Expected useful life of an AGV. Based on industry standards (typically 5-10 years).

discountrate.label: Discount Rate (%)
discountrate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return. Based on corporate finance standards.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment in ROI calculations.

currentmaterialcostperunit.label: Mevcut Malzeme Birim Maliyeti
currentmaterialcostperunit.helper: Mevcut ambalaj malzemesinin birim maliyeti. ISO 14000 çevre yönetimi ve maliyet muhasebesi standartlarına dayanır.

newmaterialcostperunit.label: Yeni Malzeme Birim Maliyeti
newmaterialcostperunit.helper: Değiştirilecek yeni ambalaj malzemesinin birim maliyeti. Tedarikçi teklifleri veya piyasa araştırması ile belirlenir.

annualusagekg.label: Yıllık Kullanım Miktarı
annualusagekg.helper: Yıllık ambalaj malzemesi tüketimi. Üretim planlaması ve envanter yönetimi verilerinden alınır.

changeovercost.label: Değişim Maliyeti
changeovercost.helper: Malzeme değişimi için gerekli ekipman ayarı, eğitim ve duruş maliyetleri. SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die) prensipleri ile ilişkilidir.

qualityimpact.label: Kalite Etkisi
qualityimpact.helper: Yeni malzemenin ürün kalitesine etkisi. ISO 9001 kalite yönetimi standartlarına dayanır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hesaplanır.

totaldowntimeminutes.label: Toplam Durma Süresi (dakika)
totaldowntimeminutes.helper: Vardiya boyunca andon sinyali nedeniyle oluşan toplam durma süresi. Lean üretimde OEE hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

responsetimeminutes.label: Ortalama Tepki Süresi (dakika)
responsetimeminutes.helper: Andon sinyaline operatörün veya ekibin müdahale etme süresi. SMED ve JIT prensiplerine göre azaltılması hedeflenir.

hourlycost.label: Saatlik İşçilik Maliyeti (para birimi/saat)
hourlycost.helper: Operatör ve ekip saatlik maliyeti. Endüstri mühendisliğinde işçilik maliyeti hesaplamaları için kullanılır.

productionrateperhour.label: Saatlik Üretim Hızı (adet/saat)
productionrateperhour.helper: Normal çalışma koşullarında saatte üretilen ürün miktarı. OEE performans hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

profitperunit.label: Birim Başına Kar (para birimi/adet)
profitperunit.helper: Her bir üründen elde edilen kar. Fırsat maliyeti hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

shifthours.label: Vardiya Süresi (saat)
shifthours.helper: Günlük vardiya süresi. Zaman oranlamaları için temel alınır.

workingdaysperyear.label: Yıllık Çalışma Günü
workingdaysperyear.helper: Yıllık çalışma günü sayısı. Yıllık maliyet hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar düzeltilir.

lotsize.label: Lot Size (Parti Büyüklüğü)
lotsize.helper: Toplam parti büyüklüğü. ISO 2859-1 standardına göre AQL örneklemesinde kullanılır.

aqllevel.label: AQL (Kabul Edilebilir Kalite Seviyesi)
aqllevel.helper: Kabul edilebilir maksimum kusur oranı. ISO 2859-1 standardına göre belirlenir.

inspectionlevel.label: Muayene Seviyesi
inspectionlevel.helper: ISO 2859-1'de tanımlanan genel muayene seviyeleri. Seviye II normal kullanılır.

samplesize.label: Örneklem Büyüklüğü
samplesize.helper: ISO 2859-1 tablolarından lot büyüklüğü ve muayene seviyesine göre belirlenen örneklem sayısı.

acceptnumber.label: Kabul Sayısı (Ac)
acceptnumber.helper: ISO 2859-1'de AQL ve örneklem büyüklüğüne göre belirlenen kabul edilebilir maksimum kusur sayısı.

defectrate.label: Gerçek Kusur Oranı
defectrate.helper: Partideki gerçek kusur oranı. Tahmini veya geçmiş verilere dayanır.

inspectioncostperunit.label: Birim Muayene Maliyeti
inspectioncostperunit.helper: Her bir ürünü muayene etmenin maliyeti.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük güven, sonuçları düzeltmek için kullanılır.

annualdemand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annualdemand.helper: Total yearly demand for the product. Based on APICS/SCOR forecasting standards.

orderingcost.label: Ordering Cost per Order ($)
orderingcost.helper: Fixed cost per order (setup, paperwork, inspection). Lean/JIT principles emphasize reducing this cost.

holdingcostperunitperyear.label: Holding Cost per Unit per Year ($)
holdingcostperunitperyear.placeholder: Enter holding cost per unit per year ($)
holdingcostperunitperyear.helper: Inventory carrying cost including storage, insurance, obsolescence. Typically 20-30% of unit cost.

unitcost.label: Unit Cost ($)
unitcost.helper: Purchase or production cost per unit. Used for financial calculations.

leadtimedays.label: Lead Time (days)
leadtimedays.helper: Time from order placement to receipt. Critical for safety stock and reorder point.

servicelevel.label: Service Level (%)
servicelevel.helper: Desired probability of not stocking out. Common values: 95% (z=1.65), 99% (z=2.33).

demandstddev.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units/day)
demandstddev.helper: Variability in daily demand. Used for safety stock calculation.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working Days per Year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Number of operating days per year. Typically 250 for manufacturing.

annualwastevolume.label: Yıllık Atık Hacmi
annualwastevolume.helper: Toplam atık miktarı (ton cinsinden). ISO 14000 çevre yönetim sistemi kapsamında atık envanteri için temel girdi.

wastetype.label: Atık Türü
wastetype.helper: Atığın sınıflandırılması; bertaraf yöntemi ve maliyeti doğrudan etkiler. AB Atık Çerçeve Direktifi ve yerel düzenlemeler referans alınır.

disposalmethod.label: Bertaraf Yöntemi
disposalmethod.helper: Atığın bertaraf edilme şekli; maliyet ve çevresel etkiyi belirler. ISO 14040 yaşam döngüsü değerlendirmesi prensipleri kullanılır.

unitdisposalcost.label: Birim Bertaraf Maliyeti
unitdisposalcost.helper: Her bir atık tonu için bertaraf ücreti. Piyasa fiyatları ve yerel tarifeler baz alınır.

transportcostpertonkm.label: Taşıma Maliyeti (ton-km başına)
transportcostpertonkm.helper: Atığın toplama noktasından bertaraf tesisine taşınması için birim maliyet. Lojistik maliyet analizi için kullanılır.

averagedistance.label: Ortalama Taşıma Mesafesi
averagedistance.helper: Atığın bertaraf tesisine ortalama uzaklığı. Yakıt, işçilik ve araç maliyetlerini etkiler.

recyclingrevenueperton.label: Geri Dönüşüm Geliri (ton başına)
recyclingrevenueperton.helper: Geri dönüştürülebilir atıklardan elde edilen gelir. Piyasa fiyatlarına bağlıdır.

laborcostperhour.label: İşçilik Maliyeti (saat başına)
laborcostperhour.helper: Atık yönetimi operasyonlarında çalışan işçilerin saatlik ücreti. Endüstri mühendisliği iş etüdü prensipleri kullanılır.

laborhoursperton.label: Ton Başına İşçilik Saati
laborhoursperton.helper: Bir ton atığın işlenmesi için gereken işçilik süresi. Zaman etüdü ve standart zaman verileri kullanılır.

equipmentcostperyear.label: Yıllık Ekipman Maliyeti
equipmentcostperyear.helper: Atık yönetimi ekipmanlarının (kamyon, konteyner, vb.) yıllık amortisman ve bakım maliyeti.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güven Düzeyi
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha temkinli yorumlanmalıdır.

flowrate.label: Debi (Q)
flowrate.helper: Sıvı akış debisi. Boru hattı tasarımında temel parametre. Kaynak: Darcy-Weisbach denklemi, ISO 5167.

pipediameter.label: Boru İç Çapı (D)
pipediameter.helper: Boru iç çapı. Sürtünme kaybı hesaplamalarında kullanılır. Kaynak: Darcy-Weisbach, ISO 6708.

pipelength.label: Boru Uzunluğu (L)
pipelength.helper: Boru hattı toplam uzunluğu. Sürtünme kaybı mesafe ile orantılıdır. Kaynak: Darcy-Weisbach.

roughness.label: Boru Pürüzlülüğü (ε)
roughness.helper: Boru iç yüzey pürüzlülüğü. Sürtünme faktörünü etkiler. Kaynak: Moody diyagramı, ISO 9906.

fluiddensity.label: Akışkan Yoğunluğu (ρ)
fluiddensity.helper: Akışkan yoğunluğu. Su için 1000 kg/m³. Kaynak: Standart sıvı özellikleri.

fluidviscosity.label: Akışkan Dinamik Viskozitesi (μ)
fluidviscosity.helper: Akışkan viskozitesi. Reynolds sayısı hesaplamak için. Kaynak: Newton tipi akışkanlar.

pumpefficiency.label: Pompa Verimi (η)
pumpefficiency.helper: Pompa verimliliği. Enerji tüketimi hesaplamalarında kullanılır. Kaynak: Pompa standartları (ISO 9906).

electricitycost.label: Elektrik Birim Maliyeti
electricitycost.helper: Elektrik enerjisi maliyeti. Enerji kaybının parasal karşılığı. Kaynak: EPDK tarifeleri.

operatinghours.label: Yıllık Çalışma Saati
operatinghours.helper: Pompanın yıllık çalışma süresi. Enerji maliyeti hesaplamaları için. Kaynak: Endüstriyel uygulamalar.

fittinglosscoefficient.label: Ek Parça Kayıp Katsayısı (K)
fittinglosscoefficient.helper: Dirsek, vana gibi ek parçaların toplam kayıp katsayısı. Kaynak: Crane Technical Paper No. 410.

annualproductionvolume.label: Annual Production Volume
annualproductionvolume.helper: Total annual production of paint and coating in tons. Based on industry benchmarks (e.g., WERC).

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Typical batch size for production. Affects setup costs and efficiency. Lean manufacturing principles (JIT).

rawmaterialcostperton.label: Raw Material Cost per Ton
rawmaterialcostperton.placeholder: Enter raw material cost per ton
rawmaterialcostperton.helper: Cost of raw materials (resins, pigments, solvents) per ton. Based on market prices and ISO 14000 environmental cost accounting.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly labor cost including benefits. Standard industrial engineering cost estimation (Maynard).

laborhoursperbatch.label: Labor Hours per Batch
laborhoursperbatch.helper: Direct labor hours required per batch. Based on time studies (Salvendy).

energycostperkwh.label: Energy Cost per kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Cost of electricity per kWh. ISO 50001 energy management standard.

energyconsumptionperbatch.label: Energy Consumption per Batch
energyconsumptionperbatch.helper: Energy used per batch (mixing, heating, drying). ISO 50001.

defectrate.label: Defect Rate
defectrate.helper: Fraction of batches that are defective. Six Sigma quality metric (DPMO).

reworkcostperton.label: Rework Cost per Ton
reworkcostperton.helper: Cost to rework defective product per ton. Includes material, labor, energy. ISO 9001 quality management.

setuptimeperbatch.label: Setup Time per Batch
setuptimeperbatch.helper: Time to setup equipment between batches. SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) lean tool.

setupcostperhour.label: Setup Cost per Hour
setupcostperhour.helper: Cost of setup labor and overhead per hour. Based on activity-based costing.

wastedisposalcostperton.label: Waste Disposal Cost per Ton
wastedisposalcostperton.placeholder: Enter waste disposal cost per ton
wastedisposalcostperton.helper: Cost to dispose of waste per ton. Environmental regulations (ISO 14000).

wasterate.label: Waste Rate
wasterate.helper: Fraction of raw material that becomes waste. Lean manufacturing waste reduction.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

steampressure.label: Buhar Basıncı
steampressure.helper: Buhar kapanı girişindeki buhar basıncı. ISO 50001 enerji yönetimi standardına göre enerji kaybı hesaplamalarında temel parametre.

orificediameter.label: Orifis Çapı
orificediameter.helper: Kaçak orifisinin tahmini çapı. Endüstriyel buhar sistemlerinde kaçak debisi hesaplamak için kullanılır.

steamcost.label: Buhar Maliyeti
steamcost.helper: Ton buhar başına maliyet. Enerji maliyet analizi için gereklidir.

operatinghours.label: Yıllık Çalışma Saati
operatinghours.helper: Sistemin yıllık çalışma süresi. Enerji kaybının yıllık maliyete dönüştürülmesinde kullanılır.

steamtype.label: Buhar Türü
steamtype.helper: Doymuş veya kızgın buhar. Buharın termodinamik özelliklerini belirler; kızgın buhar için düzeltme faktörü uygulanır.

dischargecoefficient.label: Deşarj Katsayısı
dischargecoefficient.helper: Orifis geometrisine bağlı akış katsayısı. Standart değer 0.65 olup, keskin kenarlı orifisler için geçerlidir.

cabinetwidth.label: Cabinet Width
cabinetwidth.helper: Standard cabinet width based on modular kitchen design (ISO 7170).

cabinetheight.label: Cabinet Height
cabinetheight.helper: Standard cabinet height for base cabinets (ISO 7170).

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Common materials for cabinet construction (ANSI/KCMA A161.1).

materialcostpersqm.label: Material Cost per Square Meter
materialcostpersqm.placeholder: Enter material cost per square meter
materialcostpersqm.helper: Market price for selected material (industry benchmarks).

doorstyle.label: Door Style
doorstyle.helper: Door style affects labor and material cost (KCMA standards).

finishtype.label: Finish Type
finishtype.helper: Finish type impacts cost and durability (ANSI/KCMA A161.1).

hardwaregrade.label: Hardware Grade
hardwaregrade.helper: Hardware quality affects cost and lifespan (ANSI/BHMA A156.9).

laborrate.label: Labor Rate per Hour
laborrate.helper: Average carpenter labor rate (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

laborhourspercabinet.label: Labor Hours per Cabinet
laborhourspercabinet.helper: Standard labor time for cabinet assembly (industrial engineering time studies).

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.helper: Number of identical cabinets to estimate total cost.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Manufacturing overhead as percentage of direct costs (cost accounting standards).

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Desired profit margin on total cost (industry standard 10-20%).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data for risk adjustment.

areasize.label: Area to Clean
areasize.helper: Total area to be cleaned in square meters. Based on industry standards for facility management (ISO 41001).

cleaningfrequency.label: Cleaning Frequency
cleaningfrequency.helper: How often cleaning is performed. Common frequencies in janitorial services.

laborrate.label: Labor Rate per Hour
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Based on minimum wage and market rates (BLS data).

laborproductivity.label: Labor Productivity
laborproductivity.helper: Area cleaned per hour per worker. Typical range from industry benchmarks (ISSA).

suppliescostpersqm.label: Supplies Cost per sqm
suppliescostpersqm.helper: Cost of cleaning supplies (detergents, disinfectants) per square meter. Based on average consumption rates.

equipmentcostpersqm.label: Equipment Cost per sqm
equipmentcostpersqm.helper: Depreciation and maintenance cost of cleaning equipment per square meter. Includes vacuum cleaners, floor polishers.

wastedisposalcostpersqm.label: Waste Disposal Cost per sqm
wastedisposalcostpersqm.placeholder: Enter waste disposal cost per sqm
wastedisposalcostpersqm.helper: Cost for waste removal and disposal per square meter. Based on local waste management rates.

overheadpercentage.label: Overhead Percentage
overheadpercentage.helper: Indirect costs (management, insurance, training) as percentage of direct costs. Typical range 15-30% in service industries.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for final cost.

annualoperatinghours.label: Yıllık Çalışma Saati
annualoperatinghours.helper: Yıllık toplam çalışma saati, vardiya düzenine göre belirlenir. ISO 9001 süreç yönetimi kapsamında standart çalışma süresi.

manuallaborcostperhour.label: Manuel İşçilik Saatlik Maliyeti
manuallaborcostperhour.helper: İşçilik maliyeti; brüt ücret, SGK işveren payı, yemek, yol gibi yan hakları içerir. Endüstri mühendisliğinde işçilik maliyet hesaplamaları.

cobotpurchasecost.label: Cobot Satın Alma Maliyeti
cobotpurchasecost.helper: Cobot'un toplam satın alma fiyatı; ekipman, kurulum, yazılım lisansı dahil. Yatırım maliyeti olarak NPV hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

cobotmaintenancecostperyear.label: Cobot Yıllık Bakım Maliyeti
cobotmaintenancecostperyear.helper: Yıllık bakım, yedek parça ve servis maliyetleri. ISO 50001 enerji yönetimi ve ekipman bakım planlaması.

cobotenergycostperhour.label: Cobot Saatlik Enerji Maliyeti
cobotenergycostperhour.helper: Cobot'un çalışma saatindeki elektrik tüketimi maliyeti. Enerji verimliliği hesaplamaları.

cobotlifespanyears.label: Cobot Ekonomik Ömrü
cobotlifespanyears.helper: Cobot'un faydalı ömrü; amortisman süresi olarak kullanılır. Muhasebe standartları ve yatırım değerleme.

discountrate.label: İskonto Oranı
discountrate.helper: Sermaye maliyeti veya alternatif yatırım getirisi. NPV hesaplamasında kullanılır. Finansal oranlar.

manuallaborproductivity.label: Manuel İşçilik Verimliliği
manuallaborproductivity.helper: Manuel işçinin standart süreye göre performansı. Endüstri mühendisliğinde iş ölçümü ve verimlilik analizi.

cobotproductivity.label: Cobot Verimliliği
cobotproductivity.helper: Cobot'un teorik kapasiteye göre çalışma verimi. OEE hesaplamaları.

defectratemanual.label: Manuel Hata Oranı
defectratemanual.helper: Manuel işçilikteki kusur oranı. Six Sigma kalite metrikleri.

defectratecobot.label: Cobot Hata Oranı
defectratecobot.helper: Cobot ile üretimdeki kusur oranı. Poka-Yoke ve otomasyon kalitesi.

reworkcostperdefect.label: Hata Başına Yeniden İşleme Maliyeti
reworkcostperdefect.placeholder: Enter hata başına yeniden i̇şleme maliyeti
reworkcostperdefect.helper: Kusurlu ürünün düzeltilmesi için katlanılan maliyet. Kalite maliyetleri (COPQ).

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hesaplanır.

usl.label: Üst Spesifikasyon Limiti (USL)
usl.helper: Müşteri gereksinimlerini tanımlar. ISO 9001 kalite yönetim sistemlerinde spesifikasyon limitleri belirlenir.

lsl.label: Alt Spesifikasyon Limiti (LSL)
lsl.helper: Müşteri gereksinimlerini tanımlar. ISO 9001 kalite yönetim sistemlerinde spesifikasyon limitleri belirlenir.

mean.label: Süreç Ortalaması
mean.helper: Sürecin merkezi eğilimini gösterir. Altı Sigma projelerinde süreç performansı ölçümü için kullanılır.

stddev.label: Standart Sapma
stddev.helper: Süreç değişkenliğini ölçer. Altı Sigma'da süreç yetenek analizi için temel parametredir.

annualproductionvolume.label: Yıllık Üretim Hacmi
annualproductionvolume.helper: Toplam hata maliyetini hesaplamak için kullanılır. Üretim planlamasında temel girdidir.

costperdefect.label: Hata Başına Maliyet
costperdefect.helper: Hurda, yeniden işleme, garanti vb. maliyetleri içerir. Kalite maliyetleri (COQ) hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Veri kalitesini değerlendirir. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar yorumlanmalıdır.

warehouselength.label: Depo Uzunluğu
warehouselength.helper: Depo fiziksel boyutu, yerleşim planı ve rota optimizasyonu için temel girdi. ISO 9001 ve WERC standartları referans alınır.

warehousewidth.label: Depo Genişliği
warehousewidth.helper: Depo fiziksel boyutu, yerleşim planı ve rota optimizasyonu için temel girdi.

numaisles.label: Koridor Sayısı
numaisles.helper: Koridor sayısı, toplama rotasının uzunluğunu ve verimliliğini etkiler. Lean prensipleri (JIT) referans alınır.

aislewidth.label: Koridor Genişliği
aislewidth.helper: Koridor genişliği, ekipman ve personel hareketini etkiler. OSHA standartları referans alınır.

numpicklocations.label: Toplama Noktası Sayısı
numpicklocations.helper: Toplama noktası sayısı, rota optimizasyonu için kritik. APICS ve WERC benchmarkları kullanılır.

ordersperday.label: Günlük Sipariş Sayısı
ordersperday.helper: Sipariş hacmi, iş gücü ve ekipman planlaması için temel girdi.

itemsperorder.label: Sipariş Başına Ortalama Kalem Sayısı
itemsperorder.placeholder: Enter sipariş başına ortalama kalem sayısı

picktimeperitem.label: Kalem Başına Toplama Süresi
picktimeperitem.helper: Operasyonel verimlilik ölçütü. MTM (Methods-Time Measurement) standartları referans alınır.

travelspeed.label: Yürüme Hızı
travelspeed.helper: Personel yürüme hızı, ergonomik ve güvenlik standartlarına göre belirlenir.

laborcostperhour.label: İşçilik Saatlik Maliyeti
laborcostperhour.helper: Finansal analiz için temel maliyet girdisi. Sektörel benchmarklar kullanılır.

layouttype.label: Yerleşim Tipi
layouttype.helper: Depo yerleşim tipi, rota uzunluğunu ve verimliliği etkiler. Lean ve Six Sigma prensipleri referans alınır.

routingstrategy.label: Rota Stratejisi
routingstrategy.helper: Toplama rotası optimizasyonu için kullanılan stratejiler. Endüstri mühendisliği literatürü (Ratliff & Rosenthal) referans alınır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliğini ifade eder. Risk yönetimi için kullanılır.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment (USD)
initialinvestment.helper: Total upfront cost for product redesign, tooling, and process changes to extend product life. Based on capital budgeting principles (NPV/ROI).

annualrevenueperunit.label: Annual Revenue per Unit (USD)
annualrevenueperunit.helper: Revenue generated per product unit per year. Used to calculate revenue impact of extended life. Standard financial metric.

unitssoldperyear.label: Units Sold per Year
unitssoldperyear.helper: Annual sales volume. Key driver for revenue and cost calculations. Based on sales forecasting.

currentproductlifeyears.label: Current Product Life (Years)
currentproductlifeyears.helper: Average lifespan of current product before replacement. Determines baseline replacement cycle. Industry benchmark data.

extendedproductlifeyears.label: Extended Product Life (Years)
extendedproductlifeyears.helper: Target lifespan after circular economy improvements. Must be greater than current life. Based on design for longevity principles.

annualoperatingcostperunit.label: Annual Operating Cost per Unit (USD)
annualoperatingcostperunit.placeholder: Enter annual operating cost per unit (usd)
annualoperatingcostperunit.helper: Cost to maintain and operate product per year (e.g., energy, repairs). Relevant for total cost of ownership (TCO).

discountrate.label: Discount Rate (%)
discountrate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return. Used for NPV calculation. Standard finance.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Common in risk analysis.

materialtype.label: Malzeme Türü
materialtype.helper: Malzeme akma dayanımı ve ekstrüzyon basıncını belirler. Kaynak: ASM Metals Handbook.

billetdiameter.label: Billet Çapı
billetdiameter.helper: Başlangıç malzemesi çapı, kesit alanını ve kuvveti etkiler. Standart: ISO 6362.

billetlength.label: Billet Uzunluğu
billetlength.helper: Malzeme hacmini ve pres strokunu belirler.

extrusionratio.label: Ekstrüzyon Oranı
extrusionratio.helper: Başlangıç kesit alanının çıkış kesit alanına oranı. Kuvvet hesaplamasında kritik. Kaynak: Extrusion Handbook.

dieangle.label: Kalıp Açısı
dieangle.helper: Kalıp giriş açısı, deformasyon bölgesini ve kuvveti etkiler. Tipik değerler 30-60°.

frictioncoefficient.label: Sürtünme Katsayısı
frictioncoefficient.helper: Billet-kalıp arası sürtünme. Yağlama durumuna bağlı. Kaynak: Tribology in Metal Forming.

ramspeed.label: Pres Hızı
ramspeed.helper: Pres ram hızı, strain rate ve kuvveti etkiler. Tipik değerler 1-20 mm/s.

temperature.label: Sıcaklık
temperature.helper: Malzeme akma dayanımını düşürür. Sıcak ekstrüzyon için 300-500°C. Kaynak: ASM.

containerdiameter.label: Konteyner Çapı
containerdiameter.helper: Billeti çevreleyen konteyner iç çapı. Billet çapından büyük olmalı.

presscapacity.label: Pres Kapasitesi
presscapacity.helper: Presin maksimum kuvvet kapasitesi. Mevcut pres seçimi için.

trainingcostperemployee.label: Çalışan Başına Eğitim Maliyeti
trainingcostperemployee.helper: Eğitim programının çalışan başına toplam maliyeti (eğitmen, materyal, tesis, seyahat vb.). ISO 10015 eğitim yönetimi standardı referans alınır.

numberofemployeestrained.label: Eğitilen Çalışan Sayısı
numberofemployeestrained.helper: Eğitime katılan toplam çalışan sayısı. İşgücü verimliliği hesaplamalarında temel girdi.

currentproductivity.label: Mevcut Verimlilik (birim/çalışan/saat)
currentproductivity.helper: Eğitim öncesi çalışan başına saatlik üretim miktarı. Endüstri mühendisliğinde standart zaman etüdü ile belirlenir.

expectedproductivitygain.label: Beklenen Verimlilik Artışı (%)
expectedproductivitygain.helper: Eğitim sonrası beklenen verimlilik artış yüzdesi. Literatürde eğitimin verimliliğe etkisi %5-30 arasında raporlanmıştır (Bartel, 1994).

laborcostperhour.label: Saatlik İşgücü Maliyeti
laborcostperhour.helper: Çalışan başına saatlik işgücü maliyeti (ücret, yan haklar, işveren payı). Maliyet muhasebesi standartları.

workinghoursperday.label: Günlük Çalışma Saati
workinghoursperday.helper: Vardiya başına çalışma saati. İş kanunu ve endüstri standartları.

workingdaysperyear.label: Yıllık Çalışma Günü
workingdaysperyear.helper: Yıllık fiili çalışma günü sayısı (tatil, izin düşülmüş).

additionalbenefitsperemployee.label: Çalışan Başına Ek Fayda (TRY/yıl)
additionalbenefitsperemployee.helper: Eğitim sonucu elde edilen ek faydalar (kalite iyileştirme, fire azaltma, motivasyon artışı vb.).

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hesaplanır.

projecttype.label: Project Type
projecttype.helper: Determines base labor factors per project complexity. Based on industry standards (NECA Manual of Labor Units).

totalcircuitlength.label: Total Circuit Length
totalcircuitlength.helper: Total length of electrical circuits (conduit, cable tray, etc.). Affects pulling, termination, and testing labor.

numberofdevices.label: Number of Devices
numberofdevices.helper: Count of outlets, switches, fixtures, panels, etc. Each device adds labor for mounting and wiring.

laborrate.label: Labor Rate
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage including burden. Based on local union rates or market surveys (RSMeans).

efficiencyfactor.label: Efficiency Factor
efficiencyfactor.helper: Adjusts for crew productivity (1.0 = standard). Factors: experience, tools, site conditions. Lean principles.

complexityfactor.label: Complexity Factor
complexityfactor.helper: Multiplier for difficult installations (cramped spaces, high ceilings, etc.). Based on NECA labor units.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy (1.0 = high). Adjusts final estimate for risk. ISO 9001 data quality.

totalenergyconsumption.label: Total Energy Consumption
totalenergyconsumption.helper: Total energy used in the facility over the reporting period. Based on ISO 50001 energy management standards.

productionoutput.label: Production Output
productionoutput.helper: Total units produced in the same period. Used to calculate energy intensity per unit.

energycostperkwh.label: Energy Cost per kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Average cost of energy (electricity, gas, etc.) per kWh. Based on utility bills.

baselineenergyintensity.label: Baseline Energy Intensity
baselineenergyintensity.helper: Historical or benchmark energy intensity for comparison. Used to calculate savings.

operatinghours.label: Operating Hours
operatinghours.helper: Total operating hours in the period (e.g., 8760 for continuous annual operation).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Adjusts final results for uncertainty.

annualenergyconsumption.label: Yıllık Enerji Tüketimi
annualenergyconsumption.helper: Toplam yıllık enerji tüketimi (elektrik, doğalgaz vb.). ISO 50001 enerji yönetim sistemi standardına göre temel girdi.

energycostperkwh.label: Birim Enerji Maliyeti
energycostperkwh.helper: Ortalama enerji birim fiyatı. Piyasa verileri veya fatura ortalaması.

systeminstallationcost.label: Sistem Kurulum Maliyeti
systeminstallationcost.helper: Enerji izleme sistemi (EMS) donanım, yazılım ve kurulum maliyeti. Piyasa araştırması.

annualmaintenancecost.label: Yıllık Bakım Maliyeti
annualmaintenancecost.helper: EMS bakım, lisans ve destek maliyeti. Genellikle kurulum maliyetinin %3-5'i.

expectedsavingspercentage.label: Beklenen Tasarruf Yüzdesi
expectedsavingspercentage.helper: EMS ile beklenen enerji tasarrufu oranı. Endüstriyel benchmark: %5-20 (ISO 50001 vaka çalışmaları).

systemlifetime.label: Sistem Ömrü
systemlifetime.helper: EMS ekipmanının ekonomik ömrü. Genellikle 10-15 yıl.

discountrate.label: İskonto Oranı
discountrate.helper: Sermaye maliyeti veya alternatif yatırım getirisi. Finansal analiz standardı (NPV hesaplaması).

inflationrate.label: Enflasyon Oranı
inflationrate.helper: Yıllık enflasyon oranı. Gelecek nakit akışlarının reel değerini düzeltmek için.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar düzeltilir.

partthickness.label: Part Thickness
partthickness.helper: Maximum wall thickness of the plastic part. Critical for cooling time calculation. Based on ISO 294-4 and standard injection molding handbooks.

thermaldiffusivity.label: Thermal Diffusivity of Material
thermaldiffusivity.helper: Material property; typical values: PP ~0.08, ABS ~0.1, PC ~0.12. Source: material datasheets.

moldtemperature.label: Mold Temperature
moldtemperature.helper: Temperature of the mold surface. Affects cooling rate. Typical range 20-80°C for amorphous polymers.

melttemperature.label: Melt Temperature
melttemperature.helper: Temperature of the molten plastic entering the mold. Based on material supplier recommendations.

ejectiontemperature.label: Ejection Temperature
ejectiontemperature.helper: Temperature at which part can be ejected without deformation. Typically 20-40°C below glass transition temperature.

injectiontime.label: Injection Time
injectiontime.helper: Time to fill the mold cavity. Depends on machine and part geometry.

packingtime.label: Packing Time
packingtime.helper: Time for holding pressure after filling to compensate shrinkage.

moldopenclosetime.label: Mold Open/Close Time
moldopenclosetime.helper: Time to open and close the mold. Depends on machine speed.

ejectiontime.label: Ejection Time
ejectiontime.helper: Time to eject the part from the mold.

cycletimetarget.label: Target Cycle Time
cycletimetarget.helper: Desired cycle time for production planning.

materialcostperkg.label: Material Cost per kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Cost of plastic material per kilogram.

machinehourlyrate.label: Machine Hourly Rate
machinehourlyrate.helper: Cost per hour to run the injection molding machine.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Operator labor cost per hour.

cavitycount.label: Number of Cavities
cavitycount.helper: Number of parts produced per cycle.

scraprate.label: Scrap Rate
scraprate.helper: Percentage of parts rejected. Typical range 1-5%.

machinepower.label: Machine Power
machinepower.helper: Power consumption of the injection molding machine.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment (TL)
initialinvestment.helper: Total capital expenditure for flexible manufacturing cell including machinery, installation, and training. Based on standard investment appraisal practices (NPV, IRR).

annualoperatingcost.label: Annual Operating Cost (TL/year)
annualoperatingcost.helper: Yearly costs for labor, maintenance, energy, and consumables. Referenced from lean manufacturing cost models.

annualrevenue.label: Annual Revenue from Cell (TL/year)
annualrevenue.helper: Expected yearly revenue generated by the flexible cell. Based on production capacity and market price.

discountrate.label: Discount Rate (%)
discountrate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return. Standard financial metric (CAPM).

projectlife.label: Project Life (years)
projectlife.helper: Expected useful life of the flexible manufacturing cell. Based on equipment depreciation standards (e.g., MACRS).

salvagevalue.label: Salvage Value (TL)
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated resale value at end of project life. Based on industry benchmarks for manufacturing equipment.

annualproductionvolume.label: Annual Production Volume (units/year)
annualproductionvolume.helper: Number of units produced per year. Key driver for revenue and cost per unit.

defectrate.label: Defect Rate (%)
defectrate.helper: Percentage of defective units. Lean Six Sigma quality metric; threshold >5% triggers warning.

setuptimeperbatch.label: Setup Time per Batch (hours)
setuptimeperbatch.helper: Time to changeover between product variants. SMED methodology; lower is better for flexibility.

batchsize.label: Batch Size (units)
batchsize.helper: Number of units per production batch. Affects inventory and setup cost per unit.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Cost per Hour (TL/hour)
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage including benefits. Used to calculate labor cost per unit.

energycostperunit.label: Energy Cost per Unit (TL/unit)
energycostperunit.helper: Energy consumption cost per unit. ISO 50001 energy management.

maintenancecostperyear.label: Maintenance Cost per Year (TL/year)
maintenancecostperyear.helper: Annual preventive and corrective maintenance. Based on equipment reliability standards.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used to adjust output for uncertainty.

currentovertimehourspermonth.label: Current Overtime Hours per Month
currentovertimehourspermonth.placeholder: Enter current overtime hours per month
currentovertimehourspermonth.helper: Total overtime hours per month. Based on labor law limits (e.g., max 270 hours/year in EU).

overtimehourlyrate.label: Overtime Hourly Rate
overtimehourlyrate.helper: Hourly wage for overtime, typically 1.5x normal rate. Based on labor contracts.

newhiremonthlysalary.label: New Hire Monthly Salary
newhiremonthlysalary.helper: Gross monthly salary for a new full-time employee. Includes base pay.

newhireproductivityfactor.label: New Hire Productivity Factor
newhireproductivityfactor.helper: Productivity of new hire relative to experienced worker. Typically 0.5-0.8 during ramp-up (Lean manufacturing).

recruitingcost.label: Recruiting Cost per Hire
recruitingcost.helper: One-time cost for advertising, interviews, background checks. Based on SHRM benchmarks.

trainingcost.label: Training Cost per Hire
trainingcost.helper: Cost of onboarding and training. Includes trainer time, materials. Based on industry averages.

monthlyproductivehoursperemployee.label: Monthly Productive Hours per Employee
monthlyproductivehoursperemployee.placeholder: Enter monthly productive hours per employee
monthlyproductivehoursperemployee.helper: Standard productive hours per month (e.g., 40 hrs/week * 4 weeks).

overtimepremiummultiplier.label: Overtime Premium Multiplier
overtimepremiummultiplier.helper: Multiplier for overtime pay (e.g., 1.5x for time-and-a-half). Based on labor laws.

employeeturnoverrate.label: Employee Turnover Rate (annual)
employeeturnoverrate.helper: Annual voluntary turnover rate. Industry average 10-20% (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

overheadrate.label: Overhead Rate
overheadrate.helper: Overhead as percentage of direct labor cost (e.g., benefits, facilities). Typically 20-40%.

materialtype.label: Malzeme Türü
materialtype.helper: Seçilen malzeme türüne göre fire oranları ve maliyet hesaplamaları değişir. Endüstriyel standartlara dayanır.

materialcostperkg.label: Malzeme Birim Maliyeti (TL/kg)
materialcostperkg.helper: Malzemenin kilogram başına satın alma maliyeti. Piyasa fiyatlarına göre belirlenir.

partweightgrams.label: Parça Ağırlığı (gram)
partweightgrams.helper: Üretilen her bir parçanın ağırlığı. Tasarım ve üretim sürecine bağlıdır.

productionvolume.label: Üretim Adedi (adet/yıl)
productionvolume.helper: Yıllık üretim miktarı. Ölçek ekonomisi ve fire oranlarını etkiler.

scraprate.label: Fire Oranı (%)
scraprate.helper: Üretim sırasında oluşan fire yüzdesi. Kalite kontrol ve süreç verimliliğine bağlıdır. ISO 9001 kalite standartları referans alınır.

recyclerate.label: Geri Dönüşüm Oranı (%)
recyclerate.helper: Fire malzemenin geri dönüştürülebilme oranı. Çevresel sürdürülebilirlik ve maliyet tasarrufu için önemlidir. ISO 14000 standartlarına dayanır.

recyclecostperkg.label: Geri Dönüşüm Maliyeti (TL/kg)
recyclecostperkg.helper: Fire malzemenin geri dönüştürülmesi için kilogram başına katlanılan maliyet. Geri dönüşüm sürecinin verimliliğine bağlıdır.

laborcostperhour.label: İşçilik Maliyeti (TL/saat)
laborcostperhour.helper: Üretimde çalışan işçilerin saatlik maliyeti. Endüstriyel mühendislik hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

cycletimeminutes.label: Çevrim Süresi (dakika/parça)
cycletimeminutes.helper: Bir parçanın üretilmesi için geçen süre. Lean üretim ve verimlilik analizlerinde kullanılır.

machinecostperhour.label: Makine Maliyeti (TL/saat)
machinecostperhour.helper: Makinenin saatlik amortisman ve işletme maliyeti. Yatırım maliyeti ve bakım giderlerini içerir.

energycostperkwh.label: Enerji Maliyeti (TL/kWh)
